app.subtitle: Astrology Cards to Illuminate Your Life

home.intro: The book offers four readings built on the solar ring. The Sun Year follows the twelve months ahead; the Horary answers a specific yes-or-no question; the Grand Trine and Cardinal Cross give shorter, more concentrated readings. You may also draw a single card for the moment, or enter the library to browse the full deck of eighty-four cards.

single.name: The Single Card
single.desc: No wheel is formed. After shuffling, draw only the top card as a brief answer for the present situation or a daily card; draw again if the question still glows.

horary.name: The Horary
horary.desc: Hold a specific question in mind, deal twelve cards, and turn over only the card in the house connected with the matter to read its yes or no.

trine.name: The Grand Trine
trine.desc: The first, fifth, and ninth houses stand 120 degrees apart: yourself, your creative power, and the way your life may expand.

cross.name: The Cardinal Cross
cross.desc: Four angular houses, each 90 degrees apart, show personality, home, marriage or partner, and career achievement. It is best used for a concise reading.

sunyear.name: The Sun Year
sunyear.desc: Read the twelve months of the coming year one by one, with a central card for the whole year's theme. Any month can be opened further into weeks, days, and even a single hour.

sun_aries.name: Assertion
sun_aries.image_description: The knight and dragon speak for themselves. This card indicates a quality of reckless heroism, and a refusal to be deterred from the battle.
sun_aries.personal: Sun/Aries people have a strong psychological drive to prove themselves through direct action. Not satisfied by just talking ideas through, they are impatient to get on with doing something about them. These impulsive qualities sometimes indicate the possibility of errors of judgment, but this personality type even finds getting out of a jam a fulfilling challenge. In fact, Sun/Aries people come into their own when faced with a challenging project. Run-of-the-mill activities do not bring out the best talents of people with this planet/sign combination, and finding themselves in this kind of situation, Sun/Aries people do their utmost to bring about change. These personalities have a strong will and much vitality and self-awareness. This can be helpful if one is forced to take the lead, when such qualities can find expression. But the person described by this card usually makes mistakes in acting immediately. Taking extra time and thought helps.
sun_aries.reading: When dealt in a reading, this card shows that the opinions and wishes of others do not easily sway the questioner, and indicates a strong determination to maintain his or her own course in life. The card reveals that the enquirer has a clear vision of what he or she wants, and knows how to achieve it. It also indicates the need to work harder and longer than most to achieve success and the respect of others. The danger when this card appears is one of acting on impulse.
sun_aries.events: Sudden acts, times requiring impulsive courage, an unexpected challenging situation; a need for quick action or defense of one's position.

sun_taurus.name: Acquisition
sun_taurus.image_description: An excessively exquisitely dressed couple promenade showing their finery for all to see. The symbol above is a ritual voodoo diagram, known as Erzulie, which represents the desire for a marriage bond and shows a love of perfume and jewelry.
sun_taurus.personal: Sun/Taurus personalities have a strong sense of purposeful determination and power. They have a natural ability to achieve mastery over physical matter, and, for this reason, often express a sense of the real value of material possessions. The ability of people with this combination to build and make things grow, coupled with their strong need for security, acts as a powerful drive towards achievement. Sun in Taurus characters know exactly what is required to satisfy their every need, and let nothing stand in the way of acquiring this. Emotional and sensitive, people with this aspect have a strong sense of beauty and appreciate the good things in life, traits that make an otherwise practical character a confirmed romantic. Great comfort is highly attractive to the Sun Taurean, and is an incentive in decision-making. But this love of comfort ensures that change doesn't come easily, and an obstinate and willful Taurean nature can resist to the point of detriment.
sun_taurus.reading: In a reading, this card shows a strong desire to achieve financial independence, and often indicates the ability to amass a comfortable amount of money. The danger when this card appears is that a natural love for life's pleasures will express itself in greed, over-lavish behavior and ostentation. The card also indicates a need to hold on to possessions, and may indicate a challenge to ownership.
sun_taurus.events: Those involving pleasure, artistic encouragement or expensive indulgence; resistance to change; a dispute over possessions; discovery of something of value, a win, gift or a surprise receipt of money.

sun_gemini.name: Versatility
sun_gemini.image_description: A talented acrobatic figure walks on his hands in order to impress. On the horizon are the symbol of the sun and the alchemical sign for gold. The star above is another ancient symbol for the sun which is, of course, a star.
sun_gemini.personal: The Sun/Gemini person's basic drive is communication, and this card indicates a mind that is quick to catch on to things and has little difficulty in expressing new ideas clearly. This card occurs when there is a need to be a "Jack of all trades" and the full gamut of one's talents will be used to the full. It indicates a need for mental and emotional flexibility and versatility in order to secure a positive result. Freedom of action and movement are essential for people with this planet/sign combination, and they suffer real frustration in life as a result of unwelcome ties placed on them by others. The inevitable nerviness this produces means that Sun/Gemini people can waste a lot of energy running in every direction at once. The negative side of this planet/sign combination is the danger of becoming intellectually arrogant, almost forcing ideas and unwanted information on to other people.
sun_gemini.reading: When this card appears in a reading, it makes a change of job likely, or perhaps the Gemini characteristic of being able to work on two tasks at once. Words in this situation are important, serving as a strong framework for the question. The Versatility card also indicates a time to open the mind to movement, physical and mental. Contact with brothers, sisters and neighbors is indicated, and many journeys may be required in relation to the question.
sun_gemini.events: A social gathering, impressing other people; the need for a quick decision; an important conversation; reliable information; some contact with the media.

sun_cancer.name: Resourcefulness
sun_cancer.image_description: In a bleak landscape, a raven converts a discarded vase into a highly decorative home.
sun_cancer.personal: The Sun/Cancer nature is emotionally sensitive, and considers feelings to be of paramount importance. This card describes a powerfully nurturing person, and whether the question it relates to concerns family, home or business, the same caring qualities come into play. As people with this planet/sign combination experience most things on an emotional level, decisions are based on how they feel rather than cold logic. Sun/Cancer people also have an excellent memory for past life-events. The need for security is prominent for Sun Cancerians, and indeed this card defines a careful person who is happier with a little something put away for a rainy day. Someone with this planet/sign aspect feels a strong need to collect and accumulate both objects and helpful people, and has difficulty in getting rid of things, just in case they come in handy. This shrewd and acquisitive talent is useful in business, in which the Sun Cancerian excels. Often, people with this aspect expend time and energy in making the home a place of beauty and luxury. Such a natural feeling for property and its potential gives a head start in real-estate matters. Sun/Cancer people put down strong roots and it takes a lot to move them once they're settled.
sun_cancer.reading: When selected, this card suggests that family background is more than usually important. Inherited family traditions contribute much to the way in which the questioner lives.
sun_cancer.events: Those requiring sympathy; suspicion based on previous experience; big family occasions, reunions, inheritance, paternal contact.

sun_leo.name: Fortune
sun_leo.image_description: A benign sun warms the world, its great rays giving a glow of creative life to the small planet.
sun_leo.personal: This is the most auspicious position for the Sun in the whole deck of cards – in its own sign, Leo. Astrologically, Sun in Leo rules the Fifth House, August, prestige, pride, children and love affairs. Sun/Leo people are defined by their dignity and generosity, great vision, and the power to see a plan and make it reality. When this card appears, it has provided, or is about to present, a great, relieved "at last" feeling. Sun in Leo is not about sudden, unexpected good luck, but much more concerned with gaining the recognition or results one has been aiming for. It represents good fortune in the sense that all the hard work put into a project or situation is at last recognized. A good performance is satisfactorily rewarded and one should now take an opportunity to lie back and relax. Although the Fortune card represents the successful end of a long, hard journey, it does not mean that the person it applies to has come to a standstill. The longed-for success has opened a doorway to new horizons and greater responsibility.
sun_leo.reading: There is an element of game-playing when this card appears in a reading. It denotes that whatever has gone before had a long-term strategy, in which each move was countered with a new problem to solve. The enquirer accepted the challenge each time, and surmounted it. When the Fortune card appears with cards that are less auspicious, it has the power to lessen any negatives in a reading.
sun_leo.events: Grand successful plan, great show or achievement, receiving recognition, a creative success, exhibition of talents, successful offspring; love affair.

sun_virgo.name: Health
sun_virgo.image_description: Three servants tend to the well-being of a princess. A pentacle invokes health and fortune.
sun_virgo.personal: The Sun in the sixth sign of the Zodiac indicates a person who has the ability to make order and system out of seeming chaos. This card rules health and work, with the knowledge that material well-being is a requisite for a fulfilling, organized working life. People with this planet/sign combination can be somewhat perfectionist in specialized areas, and, as a result, a little hard on those less able to match their high standards. Care should be taken not to develop too nagging a nature in the name of helping the less organized. A good thinker, the Sun Virgoan values learning in order to analyze and grasp the essence of things. Material progress is also respected by Sun/Virgoans, who have a fondness for the good things in life but do not throw away hard-earned money on rubbish. These abilities flourish in service to others, when the Sun Virgoan is able to give to those in need. Although Sun/Virgo personalities have a great deal of modesty, it is also important that their value is appreciated. Some kind of interest or occupation in diet, nutrition or complementary health is common to the people this card describes. The negative side of the Sun/Virgo combination is a tendency to over-worry about health, which may lead to excessive pill-popping and hypochondria.
sun_virgo.reading: When this card is selected, it can indicate a strong need to put one's life in order, and it highlights diet, nutrition and health.
sun_virgo.events: Analytical work; a new health regime, concern with physical well-being; cataloging or organizing, correcting or editing work.

sun_libra.name: Harmony
sun_libra.image_description: A beautiful figure sits on a mound and looks up to the heavens. The birds represent spiritual harmony and the transient link between spiritual heaven and material earth.
sun_libra.personal: The basic Sun/Libra nature is easy-going and sociable, with an ability to relate to others in a balanced and co-operative way. Although the House Libra rules is concerned with marriage and close relationships, it has a broader meaning, governing all day-to-day social contacts. Fairness at all costs is important for the Sun Libran: there may be times when the character that this card describes may be seen as indecisive because of the need to weigh up the pros and cons before coming to a conclusion. Plenty of good conversation and amiable discussion is one of his or her greatest pleasures, and a Libran is a good counselor and probably a potentially good diplomat when helping out friends with problems. Sun Librans attract strong, capable and loyal friends, and relationships are of paramount importance to them.
sun_libra.reading: The best successes of these personality types are always shared successes. However, although the Sun Libran undoubtedly works best in partnerships, this card suggests someone who is more of an initiator and who will very often be the member of a team who sets the ball rolling. When one selects the Harmony card, it often indicates a gain from a close relationship, although it can show that one or the other party tends to be pushily dominant. The Harmony card also points to talent in the field of public relations or sales.
sun_libra.events: Situations such as important social gatherings and reunions; extravagant tastes; a difficult decision to make; a pact or agreement, a diplomatic action, being called in to adjudicate a situation.

sun_scorpio.name: Endurance
sun_scorpio.image_description: A Herculean figure wrestles to overcome a lion, the symbol of the Leo-ruled Sun.
sun_scorpio.personal: The Sun/Scorpio combination describes a person aware of the extreme qualities in his or her character. Passion in the broadest sense rules such characters' lives. What they care about, they are devoted to. To some, people with this aspect seem rather secretive, but the truth is that they would rather remain silent than give a watered-down version of what they believe. In order to achieve that which is desired, they are prepared to expend phenomenal energy. Sun Scorpions display a strong sensitivity to the thoughts and feelings of other people, and an intense drive to investigate and understand the nature of things around them. Scorpio is the sign of extremes, and usually indicates a need to take a new path in life. This may manifest as a desire to study such subjects as psychology, philosophy or mysticism. It is obviously good if Sun Scorpions are able to use these abilities in an effective way, and as such people are potential leaders, it would be surprising if they did not run their own business, department or other venture.
sun_scorpio.reading: When this card is selected, it indicates a compulsive curiosity in the deeper mysteries of life and an interest in self-improvement through strength of will. Often, the card draws attention to a period in which a great challenge must be met with equal tenacity. Some dealings with taxes, legal matters or the handling of the finances of other people will also be prominent.
sun_scorpio.events: Situations requiring extreme effort or self-control; those involving propaganda or persuasion; power-seeking; an obsessive cause or interest; making a drastic life-change.

sun_sagittarius.name: Enthusiasm
sun_sagittarius.image_description: A bright intelligent head haloed by the sun sits at the top of a traditional alchemical jar. Within the jar, a figure floats among the stars, sun and moon.
sun_sagittarius.personal: Sun/Sagittarius people value honesty, straightforwardness and freedom. They believe in these values not only for themselves, but for others, which makes such characters say what they think and hang the consequences: the Sun Sagittarian may not be much of a diplomat, but is rarely a hypocrite. This card describes someone who is energetic and outgoing, with a good sporty sense of fun and adventure. In fact, if life is a journey, Sun/Sagittarius is one of the best fellow travelers – if friends can keep up. Travel, whether physical or mental, is important for Sun Sagittarians, and the search for the truth may take them long distances in both senses. It is important for people with this planet/sign combination really to know what they believe philosophically. Regardless of educational background, they are able to deal with deeper, more abstract concepts than most people.
sun_sagittarius.reading: When this card is chosen, it indicates an attraction to foreign places and people – to the extent that the person concerned could live for some time in another country. It also reveals a strong intuitive ability that gives sudden flashes of inspiration or visions of future events. The Enthusiasm card in a reading predicts a drive to continue education and to keep up a renewed interest in philosophical, religious or ethical concepts. The downside of this card is the chance that one is about to let out a home truth that might hurt someone's feelings.
sun_sagittarius.events: Splendid opportunities; contact from abroad, the prospect of long-distance travel; a new philosophy, optimism about a new project.

sun_capricorn.name: Achievement
sun_capricorn.image_description: A fortified city over which a large impressive palace presides. In the sky is an opulent sun, and, above it, an idol in the form of a goat.
sun_capricorn.personal: A Sun/Capricorn combination is a strong indication of someone who is a conscientious and ambitious organizer. This mix produces excellent intuitive faculties that can be put to good use in achieving life aims. The goal for people with this planet/sign combination is a slow and steady advancement, based on solid ground and security-oriented. This card describes those who find it easy to reach a responsible position in a community, and it is here that their abilities lie. Sun/Capricorn people have a good talent for organizing and thrive in an executive post at whatever level feels comfortable to them. He or she will have the patience to work hard in obtaining the necessary skills to achieve honor and recognition, and the Sun in this sign shows an undoubted strong ambition to attain power and authority. If the person this card describes has all these typical qualities, he or she has a lot to look forward to: the phrase "life begins at forty" will have many pleasurable connotations. Negative aspects to this combination of qualities could push the Sun Capricornian towards an unscrupulous desire to get on in life no matter the cost. There can also be a tendency to exploit others.
sun_capricorn.reading: Often when one receives this card in a reading it indicates a powerful moral sense and a feeling of obligation to set a good example for others. This may be because one has been chosen or promoted to a role.
sun_capricorn.events: Commitment to a project, great responsibility; recommendation or distinction in some activity; help of influential or famous people.

sun_aquarius.name: Idealism
sun_aquarius.image_description: A minstrel pipes accompaniment to the eccentric journey of a dignitary casually riding a mule. The rider carries a cornucopia in one hand and a wand in the other. Above, an angel pours the free-flowing Aquarian wisdom on those below.
sun_aquarius.personal: The Sun/Aquarius character could be defined as having an unusual, determined and sometimes stubborn temperament. Such types are not too concerned about what others think about their beliefs and behavior, and so may be considered "original" if not downright eccentric. Questioning old, "stick-in-the-mud" ways and exploring the new is very much what Aquarians are about. Mental achievements are most important to Sun/Aquarius types, and their quest is a constant exchange of ideas with others in order to fix their own beliefs. Their needs cause them to gather around them friends and acquaintances of all shapes, sizes, creeds and colors. Sun Aquarians value interesting friendships with inventive or scientific people, and anything new, novel, scientific or gadgety also has appeal. Essentially a person of the twenty-first century, the Sun Aquarian keeps up with the times and supports the causes that take us into the future. It is with this latter concern that people with this planet/sign combination may find real satisfaction, bringing their sympathy for human problems to idealistic and good causes.
sun_aquarius.reading: When this card occurs in a reading, it often indicates help from friends with power and influence. It shows that taking the lead in a group activity could be rewarding, especially if the cause arouses the questioner's humanitarian instincts.
sun_aquarius.events: Eccentric behavior, an original idea or invention, involvement in an attention-seeking act; sudden upset; lateral thinking; an influential acquaintance gives a helping hand.

sun_pisces.name: Vision
sun_pisces.image_description: At the edge of the sea is an image of the sun half below the water. It is unclear whether it is rising or setting. A lynx follows the gaze of the sun. Above, the single eye represents the inner eye of psychic vision.
sun_pisces.personal: The Sun/Pisces card describes the kind of person who is extremely sensitive to the thoughts and feelings of others. In many ways, this sympathy and feeling for others can easily seduce the Sun Piscean into becoming and doing what others want. The opposite side of the coin, however, is the pop star, fashion leader or ad-man who knows exactly how to tap into and exploit the mass feelings of the moment. Most Pisceans have a little of each quality in their make-up. One thing is certain – they are among the most imaginative people in the zodiac, and, given a suitable outlet for this talent for day-dreaming, they are made in life. With the Sun in this sign, the Piscean will is directed to exploring his or her own unconscious and imaginative resources. It seems that no matter how successful Piscean people become at making their own way in life, they have a strong need to give, look after, and make sacrifices for others.
sun_pisces.reading: When this card is selected, the questioner may be dreaming of escape in the form of a long-distance voyage or other "get-away-from-it-all" activity. The Vision card may also indicate a new interest, and very often some ability in psychology and/or psychic research. It suggests that at some time in the future, the person asking the question may be involved with a large institution, and that service to others will provide great satisfaction, recognition and fulfillment.
sun_pisces.events: A sacrifice; a mystery or a confusion of imagination and reality; a chance to escape; a miracle; situations in which one loses the plot.

moon_aries.name: Protection
moon_aries.image_description: A gentle mother dotes on her children. The waxing moon above with the symbol of the tiger below indicates the immense instinctive protective power of the feminine side of human nature.
moon_aries.personal: The combination of Moon and Aries indicates a powerful need to respond emotionally and immediately to a situation. This can make people with this planet/sign combination quite volatile and impulsive, expressing what they feel in a direct and willful manner. But because of the fluctuating nature of the Moon and the speed of action of Mars, quick flare-ups are fortunately just as quickly forgotten. The person this card describes has feelings that are strongly colored by early childhood conditioning, and an intense need to protect and defend anything that represents "family." Just as the Moon's cycle waxes and wanes, so the Moon/Aries nature can be somewhat moody and changeable, fluctuating with the environment. Often the Moon Arian has a strong impressionability that could indicate some psychic ability or potential for medium-like powers. There is a great deal of independence in the Moon/Aries combination, but if the negative side takes over, this card can describe an emotional bully. The Moon/Aries' need for recognition could also lead to approval-seeking.
moon_aries.reading: In a reading, this card might suggest that the questioner watch that sympathy with another's predicament does not leave him or her vulnerable to manipulation. One could find oneself having to protect one's position. The card may indicate a link with the questioner's talent for buying property, or running a business from home.
moon_aries.events: Defensive action, maternal instinct; business enterprise, arguments over property, reluctantly moving; family upsets or responsibility.

moon_taurus.name: Exaltation
moon_taurus.image_description: A waxing moon sends out floral rays above while below two garlanded cornucopias hold fruits of the earth.
moon_taurus.personal: The Moon/Taurus combination demonstrates that to feel good emotionally, one has to feel secure, and security for this personality means material well-being. Luckily, Moon Taureans have a knack of making the things they need grow and grow, as long as they are comfortable with their feelings. Usually, the Moon/Taurus temperament is steady and placid, and a stable home and family life is of paramount importance to the well-being of Moon Taureans: without this, many succumb to over-eating as a compensation. This card could be said to be the "green fingers" card, since the Taurean love of beauty combined with the Moon's nurturing qualities make for many excellent gardeners with the Moon/Taurus combination. In astrology, the placing of the Moon in Taurus is regarded as excellent, and is traditionally known as the Moon's exaltation. This means that it is allowed full expression in this sign and usually bodes well for any question that is the subject of the reading.
moon_taurus.reading: This card appears when strong hunches about making money are about to pay off. It may indicate that business possibilities to do with food, catering, property or a business operated from home will be successful. The card can warn of the typical Taurean danger of self-indulgence, which can spoil or upset any good situation.
moon_taurus.events: Possession of something beautiful, an excessive attachment to material comforts; inheriting a piece of family property; artistic expression that proves profitable; financial worries that may or may not be justified; a good business opportunity.

moon_gemini.name: Adaptability
moon_gemini.image_description: Two strange performers. Above, a four-armed figure holds a sun-moon, a dove, a growing shrub and a flower. He stands on the back of another man balancing an ankh on his foot. Beneath, a boat is supported by four replicas of the magicians' Ape of Thoth.
moon_gemini.personal: The Moon/Gemini personality rationalizes emotions, and his or her need to talk and explore the whys and wherefores of feelings can make for expensive phone bills. Early childhood memories will, to a large extent, condition the current thoughts and ideas of people with this planet/sign combination. Moon Geminians have an intensely strong imagination and sense of fantasy coupled with a very good memory. Restless curiosity keeps this personality type constantly on the move, avoiding monotony at all costs. Spontaneous quick-wittedness and an ability to come up with the right answer most of the time is tiring, though, and nerves always suffer. The negative aspect of this placing of the Moon is a tendency towards nervous troubles and fidgety feet. Too many ideas and concerns running round inside the head at the same time is no way to solve problems: the person the Adaptability card describes may even forget what he or she felt in the first place. The need to talk everything out, although of prime importance, must also be balanced with periods of mental relaxation.
moon_gemini.reading: When this card is drawn, close relatives, brothers and sisters will be prominent in the life of the questioner, and will always be a part of the response. Negatively, the Adaptability card indicates a period of fidgeting during which it will be almost impossible to relax.
moon_gemini.events: Important discussions with relations; taking examinations; confused thinking; information changes; secretive comments; laying one's cards on the table.

moon_cancer.name: Friendship
moon_cancer.image_description: Above, children play in a wheatfield among the cornflowers. They share the delight in the flight of the heron. Below, either side of a crescent moon symbolizing fruitfulness, are two ancient alchemical symbols of the moon metal, silver.
moon_cancer.personal: The Moon is the natural ruler of the sign Cancer, and people with this planet/sign combination are comfortable with their emotions: moreover, somewhat like a mother hen, they seem able to feel everybody else's as well. To Moon Cancerians, the world really is how they feel it to be; if that turns out to be tough, they can hard-shell those around them with their out-and-out defensive crabbiness. Emotionally, Moon Cancerians are at their best when all is well with home and family. For them, family is all: friends become family, and family become friends. The early influence of parents, whether enjoyed or not, remains a strong influence throughout life. This position of the Moon also shows the potential for becoming a good cook or at least a lover of good food. However, upset emotions can cause Cancerians digestive troubles that may well reverse this indication, focussing concentration instead on nurturing the family.
moon_cancer.reading: When this card occurs in a reading, it indicates a shrewd business ability, if the questioner dares launch out on his or her own. Often when the Friendship card occurs, it highlights an almost psychic sensitivity to the thoughts and feelings of others: the person asking the question may be called upon in the future to act as a shoulder to cry on for a close friend or a family member.
moon_cancer.events: Situations such as important family gatherings and celebrations of anniversaries; inheritance of heirlooms, genealogy, distant relations; moving house; sharing a friend or family member's problems.

moon_leo.name: Appreciation
moon_leo.image_description: Above, a rich and elegant lady performs on a lute. Her audience is a swift symbolizing spring and new creation. Below is a cornucopia bursting with fruit symbolizing man and woman, Sun and Moon.
moon_leo.personal: The emotions of somewhat prima-donna-ish Moon/Leo characters require affection, appreciation, and lots of good opportunities for over-dramatic expression. This card indicates a need to be center stage as regards feelings, because for Leos big is beautiful, and they can be as emotionally generous as they are bullying. Emotionally, Moon/Leo people are great romantics. Feelings are important to them and must be appreciated and respected if Moon lions are to maintain their usual warm optimism. Children can be an important part of their life and, whether they have any of their own or not, people with this planet/sign combination are fond of the company of young-thinking people. This basically emotionally optimistic person has a tendency to over-impulsive actions where loved ones are concerned. He or she often has a good natural feeling for art and can benefit from developing latent talents in this area.
moon_leo.reading: When this card appears in a reading, it can indicate a powerful need for recognition in some aspect of life. There may be a feeling that those around are not responding appreciatively enough, provoking an unhelpful over-the-top response. The card can also indicate emotional dependency on a partner or close friends. Positively, if the card does not refer to the questioner, it can portray someone popular, generous and much admired by others.
moon_leo.events: A lavish occasion; theatrical event, children's performance; pride in an achievement; short-lived fame, excessively dramatic behavior; family party or gathering.

moon_virgo.name: Order
moon_virgo.image_description: Above are three neat rows of growing plants and three symbols representing order in nature and design. Below, a strip of brocade suggests patient and delicate needlework.
moon_virgo.personal: Moon Virgos like to keep emotions tidy and private. Eschewing big scenes and showy expressions of feelings, the person this card describes prefers sincerity, modesty and quiet forms of expression. Nevertheless, he or she shows emotions in practical and material ways. Sometimes the Moon/Virgo card reveals an aptitude for work in catering and food preparation. The modest side to the Virgoan's emotions makes it necessary that they keep all feelings on an even keel. Ups and downs do not suit the Virgoan need for order and consistency. Outbursts of feeling or sentiment by others always embarrass this character. There is, of course, a danger with this Moon placing that one may get hurt by other people, who have little regard for feelings so minimally shown. To keep on good form, the person this card describes should seek to find some form of balance. Emotional well-being is important to the health of a Virgoan, and upsets inevitably lead to pill-popping. Diet and health are important, too, with this Moon placing, and if the person described is not on top of emotions, he or she could become a fastidious, fussy health crank. With the Virgoan drive for perfection, this card suggests the danger of becoming over-critical and nagging.
moon_virgo.reading: When this card appears in a reading, it may indicate a tidying up of work systems and health issues. It shows that good healthy diet regimes and new, efficient, day-to-day work procedures are necessary or desirable.
moon_virgo.events: A new health regime; family responsibility, social work or organization; background work or research.

moon_libra.name: Companionship
moon_libra.image_description: Above, four classical feminine figures link arms in friendship. Below, hands grasp in greeting; the pomegranate is a symbol of the Sun and indicates fertility and growth.
moon_libra.personal: The emotions of Moon/Libra people are invariably influenced by those around them. They really care how others are feeling, and can be quickly upset when all is not harmonious. Librans are vulnerable to immersing their own emotional needs in someone else's difficulties. The biggest problem this card indicates is when a powerful desire to please and keep everything in balance emotionally leads to someone giving in under tricky situations in order to maintain harmony. Environment is an important influence on Moon Librans, who feel the need for an atmosphere of good taste and beauty. The Libran emotional ideal is to feel at one with a partner in a harmonious setting. Life is rarely as perfect as that, and this character may feel the constant need to act as peacemaker between others. It is good to swing the balance occasionally, and risk a bit of selfishness in order not to get sat on so frequently. How other people feel and act affects people with this planet/sign combination more than most, and they might be watchful not to fall into the trap of allowing themselves to be treated like a doormat.
moon_libra.reading: When this card is chosen, it often indicates a marriage or relationship entered into purely for emotional and domestic security. Because of the Moon's link with the home and Libra's usual good taste, the Companionship card will indicate someone who has a beautiful home.
moon_libra.events: Beautifying the home; discussions about business or contracts, seminars; teamwork, new friendships; social meetings.

moon_scorpio.name: Power
moon_scorpio.image_description: Above, a stone gateway indicates feminine power, and behind, black hills represent challenge and ambition. The sun and moon unite. Below; a woman lies dreaming.
moon_scorpio.personal: Moon/Scorpio people have very strong feelings and form lasting emotional attachments. Intensely loyal, they are, however, susceptible to brooding jealousy and strong emotional outbursts. The Moon is traditionally in its "fall" in Scorpio, and so this is not a sign in which emotions are freely expressed. Often, an immense conservation of emotional energy is released in an intense and extreme manner. People with this combination can hold a grudge longer than most, but find no sacrifice too great for a loved one. Moon Scorpios can at times be overwhelmed by intense emotional reactions and an almost psychic sensitivity to others. These qualities are helpful in developing an aptitude for healing and counseling. Certainly with all this emotional energy, Moon Scorpions find some kind of work helping the less fortunate fulfilling. Family matters are rarely smooth for people with this aspect, often involving seemingly causeless separations. Moon Scorpios are potentially very sensual, and when over-indulged, this can lead to problems. With the extreme emotional power that this combination engenders, the old adage that Scorpios make the most powerful friends and most destructive enemies becomes a reality.
moon_scorpio.reading: When this card is drawn, it usually involves emotional fireworks – passion or hate, enthusiasm or indifference, there is rarely a middle ground. Often, the card indicates an inheritance that could radically change life.
moon_scorpio.events: Powerful emotional situations; a secret suddenly revealed; psychological problems; an inheritance; love turning to hate or vice versa.

moon_sagittarius.name: Optimism
moon_sagittarius.image_description: Above, a damsel rides a pair of sea horses. The horse is Sagittarius's beast and the fish tails represent the watery Moon. In the sky is a cherub leading the voodoo ritual diagram (vèvè) that conjures truth, justice and love ruled by reason.
moon_sagittarius.personal: Moon Sagittarians are somewhat idealistic emotionally: they express feelings honestly, and expect others to be equally straightforward. Usually confident, people with this planet/sign combination can, unthinkingly, be crushingly gauche with their frankness. It is important for Sagittarians to say what they understand to be true at the risk of hurting the feelings of other people, believing that their honesty is more important to relationships than well-meaning white lies. Moon/Sagittarius types are far-thinking and always have their sights set on distant lands and truths. Journeying is their pleasure, and their optimism is unbounded. Emotions are high when they are on the move, traveling physically or mentally. They probably still have a deep, unconscious emotional attachment to the religious, social and ethical values inherited from family during childhood. Though these beliefs may now manifest as something more unorthodox, the spiritual side of life is of great significance to Moon Sagittarians. Negatively, the person this card describes may reflect a narrow and dogmatic social or religious outlook; the Optimism card may describe an extreme and immovable fundamentalist.
moon_sagittarius.reading: When this card is chosen, it always indicates that a long trip abroad is imminent or that a visit from someone from the past or a friend from a distant country will be important to the person asking the question.
moon_sagittarius.events: A move to another country, exploring foreign philosophy, planning a holiday; a family project; contact from the past; a reason for optimism.

moon_capricorn.name: Practicality
moon_capricorn.image_description: Above, a rustic scene represents order and practicality, with ruler and servants; tillers of the soil and millers of wheat. Below; a pattern alludes to worker bees and the Moon lotus flowers that bring forth honey.
moon_capricorn.personal: The Moon/Capricorn character can be a little cautious and restrained in expressing true emotions. They always seek practical and material answers to emotional problems; rarely will this person show what he or she feels to be weak expressions of feelings in any situation. People with this planet/sign combination care how other people see them, and tend to hold in feelings in order to maintain an image of outward calm. The position of the Moon in this sign also indicates an over-sensitive reaction to imagined or real slights from others. The Moon Capricornian's position in society contributes to his or her emotional well-being, and people with this planet/sign aspect usually have an emotional need for prominence and recognition, and may have a family history of achievement to live up to. Whatever degree of achievement this is, Moon Capricornians have strong family links, with the mother in particular representing a profound influence.
moon_capricorn.reading: Drawing this card suggests that the person to whom it refers will be brought prominently before the public eye. It indicates ability in the political or community field; if this is not already part of life, it could become important. The card suggests exceptional organization abilities that need a vehicle to bring about success. Often the Practicality card indicates the assistance of a prominent or successful woman in advancing the career of the person asking the question.
moon_capricorn.events: Social work; practical assistance; recognition for patient and unassuming work, achievement through diligence.

moon_aquarius.name: Independence
moon_aquarius.image_description: Above, on a plinth in front of the circular plan of the British temple Stonehenge, an Egyptian female royal figure. To either side are the sign of the Water-carrier and a waxing crescent Moon. The Menhirs of Carnac, France, indicate the yearly cycles of Sun and Moon.
moon_aquarius.personal: Moon Aquarians require complete freedom of expression for their feelings, coming and going as they please physically and emotionally. Often, Aquarians are stubborn or just perverse when others get a little too close and clingy. They switch emotions quickly, from friend to friend and mood to mood. Friendship on a broad level keeps Moon Aquarians emotionally high. This means plenty of friends, plenty of new contacts, and a great deal of conversation. Lasting friendships with women are more than usually important for people with this aspect, reflecting the feminine Moon placed in the sign. The Aquarian desire for constant contact with others is valued in order to exchange, form and reform ideas, the bond being more usually with the mind than with the heart. This card describes someone whose feelings and emotions tend to be rationalized and thought over interminably. Moon/Aquarius is also traditionally a planet/sign combination that indicates an astrologer.
moon_aquarius.reading: Often when this card occurs in a reading, it shows that the person asking the question is trapped in a mental whirlwind. It indicates a need to let go of emotions and to allow feelings to express themselves without rationalizing them. It also suggests that the questioner's home will be used in the future for group meetings with some kind of good cause or humanitarian subject.
moon_aquarius.events: Some kind of unconventional assistance, original ideas brought to bear on a situation or a subject; a second opinion canvassed; an interest in astrology.

moon_pisces.name: Empathy
moon_pisces.image_description: Above, in a charming country scene with a winding river, a child pets a large dog, the two enjoying just being together. Below; a golden-bird ornament symbolizes the spirit image linked to the material – gold. The ear represents an openness to calls for help.
moon_pisces.personal: People with a Moon/Pisces personality display a supersensitive emotional nature that acts like a psychic sponge, soaking up the feelings and thoughts of others. In fact, the way in which people with this planet/sign combination feel responds very strongly to the vibes they pick up from others. Easily hurt, but emotionally resilient, the Moon Piscean often has to be helped to be able to express feelings fully. Emotions for Pisceans are related strongly to the unconscious and to past experience. Whether they have experimented with psychic abilities or not, they undoubtedly have great potential for development in this area. The Moon in Pisces card describes someone with a deep underlying shyness that contrasts with a great sensitivity and an ability to make contact with other people. This card can often also indicate an intuitive ability for fashion in all areas, and highlights a good business aspect when hunches are played with a degree of realism.
moon_pisces.reading: When this card appears in a reading, it suggests that the questioner has more concern for the feelings of others than for his or her own emotions. The Empathy card also indicates a very good feeling for public taste that can be exploited by the development of a new service or product that satisfies a general need.
moon_pisces.events: Situations such as a hidden mystery, a powerful dream or a premonition; a tendency to escape from situations through alcohol and drugs; the need to make a sacrifice; an ability to tap into the public mood or taste to one's advantage.

mercury_aries.name: Restlessness
mercury_aries.image_description: The classical figure of Mercury dashes across an urban landscape. In the sky, the Sun is a compass indicating the ultimate in creative possibilities and the multitude of directions in which Mercury can travel.
mercury_aries.personal: Mercury Arians are decisive and active thinkers, fond of debate and argument. Mentally, they tend to be competitive and impulsive, making decisions quickly and a little one-sidedly. With Mercury in this position, there is always a danger that one might have too many irons in the fire and thus waste a great deal of mental and physical energy. This card describes someone who is probably quite articulate and bases most actions on good thinking and logic. With a higher than average intelligence, people with this planet/sign combination have an ability to express themselves verbally, which will be important to them in any kind of achievement. However, natural curiosity and the ability to grasp quickly the essence of things leads to a restless existence and a need to constantly be on the move. Tiring quickly of project after project, people with Mercury in Aries are on an eternal search for new stimulation. Negatively, because of the sheer over-activity of the mind, the Mercury Arian is prone to irritability and temper, and has a need always to have the last word in any argument.
mercury_aries.reading: When this card is drawn, it indicates a great need for the questioner to scribble down thoughts and ideas on paper; this could set the enquirer on the road to becoming a writer of some kind. The Restlessness card can sometimes suggest a long-drawn-out dispute, with much correspondence.
mercury_aries.events: Research or detective work; competitive written work or discussion, taking up creative writing; a big argument; spontaneous communication, contact with the media.

mercury_taurus.name: Resistance
mercury_taurus.image_description: A statue of a bull made of stone remains rigid in a pose that is immovable and defensive. Behind, a shrub blows in the breeze and a parrot chatters meaninglessly. In the sky, the symbol of Taurus appears almost like another bird flapping its wings.
mercury_taurus.personal: For Mercury Taureans, thinking and decision-making are closely allied to the practical, material and common-sense. They often have an extreme preoccupation with business and monetary affairs. Such personalities tend not to rush into action on new or speculative ideas, and, in fact, are usually suspicious of concepts that threaten to change a present, comfortable situation. The Mercury Taurean displays acute powers of concentration and has a good mind for running a business or making things grow and grow. Mercury in the sign of the Bull can, however, indicate an extremely obstinate attitude. This personality type bases his or her set of values on things that produce concrete results. For Mercury Taureans, fly-by-night ideas have little appeal, and neither does wasteful chatter. This unflinching concentration on what is, to them, important gives such people an ability to ignore distractions and see only the tangible and profitable essence of a situation. This does not make such personalities mean – comfort and life's pleasures are always of importance to them – simply that the moneymaking aspect of a venture has to be based on sound reasoning.
mercury_taurus.reading: Often this card, when it appears in a reading, denotes a need to focus on financial thinking, and can be an indication that the questioner must look at accounting, economics or business advice. Alternatively, it may denote work in travel, transport or the media.
mercury_taurus.events: Drafting contracts, haggles over document wording, insurance policies; discussions about beauty or art; the need to take financial advice.

mercury_gemini.name: Excitement
mercury_gemini.image_description: On a prancing, nervous horse, a sagacious figure blows a great horn, the echoes broadcasting like rays across a cloudy sky. Behind, an old, venerated tower symbolizes past wisdom and achievements.
mercury_gemini.personal: Mercury is totally at home in the sign of Gemini. Here, in its natural sign, it describes someone with an excitable, agile and versatile mind: a personality type found in all kinds of media, teaching and publicity roles. People with this planet/sign combination have an intense curiosity for everything going on around them, and this gives them a sparkling pleasure in life, which is easily communicated to others. Capable of deep concentrated thought, Mercury Geminians are more likely to spread themselves mentally in order to learn everything about everything: an holistic approach to taking on information has more appeal to this character than dogged specialist research of one subject. This card describes people who show an interest in all forms of communication, the media, travel and social gatherings. They have a talent for writing and talking, and are most probably making a successful career in this area. This placing of Mercury certainly offers a great deal of originality and versatility to express.
mercury_gemini.reading: When this card appears in a reading, it usually indicates that the questioner will benefit from a period of busy, communicative socializing, with plenty of short trips related to the question. Negatively, the Excitement card can denote constant changing of the mind, jumping from one decision to the next with equal excitement and enthusiasm that annoys others.
mercury_gemini.events: A publicity campaign; a new subject for study; an opportunity to make a speech; an important decision, changing one's mind on an important issue; a busy social calendar.

mercury_cancer.name: Intuition
mercury_cancer.image_description: The three disks are symbols, representing the pentacle, the seal and the angel of the Moon. Floating above a starred cloud, a meditating four-armed figure holds two lotus flowers, symbolizing intuitive and inspired creativity.
mercury_cancer.personal: For Mercury Cancerians, thoughts and feelings are inseparable. This card describes someone who makes decisions based on current feelings, or on how he or she felt last time the situation arose – for people with this planet/sign aspect, past experience plays an important part in reactions to a current situation. Mentally and emotionally comparing life events in this way is a constant protective reaction. Mercury Cancerians are vulnerable to ideas or causes strongly based in the emotions, and respond completely intuitively to such situations. Much mental activity goes on in their homes, and it would be surprising if this character did not accumulate hoards of books. Mercury Cancerians tend to collect snippets of knowledge like a nostalgic filing cabinet, and once they are on the phone to friends and loved ones, phone bills soar. Despite the gossipy nature of people with this planet/sign combination, it often suggests a genuine talent for creative writing. The Cancerian influence also highlights an excellent memory, and indicates one of those lucky people who absorb and remember information unconsciously.
mercury_cancer.reading: When this card is dealt, it always refers to traditional family ways of thinking and ideas based on early childhood conditioning. The thoughts and comments of close family and friends will be of great importance to the subject of the reading.
mercury_cancer.events: History or events in the past, a revival of old memories, or a visit from a long-lost acquaintance; taking the advice of family or friends; study in the home.

mercury_leo.name: Drama
mercury_leo.image_description: A Möbius tube twines endlessly in a vision that defies and puzzles the mind. A great lion roars to draw attention to himself. The disk is a talisman with the pentacle to secure eloquence.
mercury_leo.personal: The Mercury Leo is best with big ideas and big thinking, and has a splendid visionary mind, able to see things as they could be. Although not the best types to deal with final details, people with this planet/sign combination are excellent at seeing the future possibilities of a grand project, and setting the ball rolling towards its achievement. This card describes the intuitive and the artist planner. Mentally self-confident, Mercury lions form ideas gradually, and are not easily moved from them once fully formed. The need to be accepted as an authority in a field demands memorable presentation skills, and Mercury Leos have the ability to express themselves dramatically in speech and writing – and take great pride in this. This aspect bodes well for those connected with either show business or the theatre, describing an aptitude for game-playing with a bias towards intellectual versatility rather than physical prowess. Negatively, Mercury Leos can go over the top in speculation, and show off intellectually.
mercury_leo.reading: Often when this card is drawn, it indicates pride in the intellectual achievements of children or young people close to the questioner. It can concern pushing those concerned to even greater efforts. There is always a flirtatious element surrounding Leo, and often this card reveals a brief affair more concerned with words than physical activity – love letters, perhaps.
mercury_leo.events: An extravagant presentation, grand occasion; holding court, mental feats; a creative interest entered into with flamboyance; a love affair through correspondence.

mercury_virgo.name: Caution
mercury_virgo.image_description: A crowned woman – earth mother – holds her hand up to protect the mad rush of small antelopes escaping the feared jackals. Their sudden movements attract danger.
mercury_virgo.personal: The Mercury Virgoan has a sharp, analytical mind and good reasoning ability. Mercury rules Virgo and Gemini, and although happy in Virgo, it manifests in a much more disciplined way than in Gemini (see page 58). Here, its essence is orderly and systematic: people with this combination approach mental activity with care, and do not waste time on unclear or confused thinking. The Mercury Virgoan requires a smooth working environment, since distractions and niggling irritations throw the perfectionist off course. Work requiring acquired skills and specialized knowledge are more suitable for such people than a broader-based, scattered occupation, and the Mercury Virgoan likes to know the boundaries of each job well before starting. He or she usually displays a talent for writing and teaching – or at least the ability to pass on information. Mercury/Virgoans are methodical thinkers and have good manipulative skills; highly specialized mental work suits these talents. At work, as at home, this type directs much mental energy into sorting out the chaos of less-efficient folks.
mercury_virgo.reading: In a reading, this card usually indicates a need to carefully examine the pros and cons of a problem before taking any action: Virgo doesn't rush heedlessly into things. Although the card indicates a specialist, as with all Mercury contacts, it holds the potential for more than one skill to fall back on in an emergency.
mercury_virgo.events: Detailed craftwork, cataloging, a laborious task needing care and patience; restoration of order at work; a need to plan ahead.

mercury_libra.name: Influence
mercury_libra.image_description: The coiled serpent's tongue is the astrological sigil for the planet Mercury. It represents smooth talk, guile, persuasion and temptation. In the first relationship, Adam and Eve walk in the garden, unaware of danger. Beneath the roses, thorns.
mercury_libra.personal: The mental expression of the Mercury/Libra character is primarily influenced by a concern with human interaction and close relationships. There is a delicacy about the Mercury Libran, who prefers the company of the reserved and cultured. Their innate curiosity about the workings of other people's thought-processes make Mercury Librans essentially sociable and friendly in outlook. Those with this planet/sign combination need plenty of healthy discussion and amiable argument to exercise their natural capacity for seeing both sides of any question. For them, ideas are best developed in brainstorming sessions with partners, where everyone's ideas are assimilated and developed together. Teamwork is undoubtedly the ideal mode of operation for Librans, and they find relationships most fulfilling when they are filled with good conversation and shared intellectual interests. Being able to see other points of view, the Libran has excellent arbitration and diplomatic talents. For this reason, people with this combination tend to gravitate to such subjects as psychology, public relations, sociology and law. Negatively, there is a danger that in constantly being fair to all, the Mercury Libran may find it impossible to come down firmly on one side of a question.
mercury_libra.reading: When this card is drawn, it suggests that the enquirer should take a second opinion from a respected colleague about the present question.
mercury_libra.events: Being tempted by others, a group venture, needing others' good advice; a renewed relationship that blossoms, the inspiration of a hero.

mercury_scorpio.name: Extremism
mercury_scorpio.image_description: A dramatic "penny-dreadful" style illustration of a struggling couple, man and woman, fighting over the contents of a letter. The words have changed everything. A crow shrieks at the scene.
mercury_scorpio.personal: The Mercury in Scorpio card describes a deep, penetrating thinker, someone both intuitive and profound, whose sharp insights into others' motivation direct the thoughts. Such personalities are widely persuasive in argument. Typically, Mercury Scorpions are said to be secretive, and do not waste time talking unless they have something worthwhile to say. They command a great deal of respect, and are endowed with a magnetic personality that claims many followers. The ability to go to an extreme opposite position in order to understand the whole possibility of an issue makes such people good investigators and researchers. It also makes them capable of drastic changes of philosophy or beliefs, which can leave others up in the air with the last swing of opinion. For Mercury Scorpios, the supreme challenge is to solve seemingly impossible problems. The challenge of the impossible is so necessary that they often even generate mishaps in order to retrieve and overcome a situation. People with this combination display great interest in science and/or the occult: understanding life's secrets, whether purely physical or more mystical, is important to them. There is also a love of intrigue that makes for good detective story writers, journalist sleuths, and crime investigators.
mercury_scorpio.reading: When this card is drawn, the questioner may face a total reappraisal of his or her life philosophy to overcome a seemingly unsolvable situation.
mercury_scorpio.events: A violent verbal outburst; news of death; the solving of a great problem, discussion of a deep life problem; a drastic change of opinion.

mercury_sagittarius.name: Discovery
mercury_sagittarius.image_description: The mummy symbolizes history and knowledge, and the boat long-distance travel. Above the ocean waves a sun created from the globe.
mercury_sagittarius.personal: Mercury/Sagittarius people have the kind of mind that responds well to further education. In fact, their search for a personal philosophy and truth is continual. Mercury Sagittarians often have prophetic insight into public trends and opinions, and are consequently successful at playing hunches. This is a good aspect for people in powerful positions, such as politics and big business. Other people's attitudes are important to people with this planet/sign combination, and awareness of others' opinions colors the Mercury Sagittarians' major ideas and decisions. This card describes someone who uses his or her accurate ability to uncover and judge public views to contribute to their own successful exploitation of such views, thus making themselves popular. Though not always logical, they invariably say what they think – and mean it. Despite this honesty, Mercury Sagittarians rarely depart from conventional views, and their desire to remain popular is paramount. They genuinely like people and people like them. Travel is important to Mercury Sagittarians, who could spend time in another country, or in the companionship of those from another culture.
mercury_sagittarius.reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, the questioner may meet someone of this type who becomes an influence. Alternatively, the enquirer may find a need to develop by expanding his or her knowledge of the world.
mercury_sagittarius.events: A visit from someone abroad, learning a foreign language, planning a long trip; discovering a philosophy or religion, following a guru or mentor; involvement in politics.

mercury_capricorn.name: Organization
mercury_capricorn.image_description: The farm scene may seem to depict the simple life, but only a rigid routine and application to duty enables the tangible fruits of the labors to be achieved.
mercury_capricorn.personal: Mercury Capricornians are shrewd, practical, organized and ambitious. There is always method in their thought-processes, and their instinctive ability to take things one step at a time makes for few pitfalls on the road to achieving ambitions. Such types always take a realistic approach to goals, and, rarely fooled by idealistic claptrap, opt for the slow but sure route rather than the fast lane. Such a conscientious and patient approach to organization needs to be balanced with a sense of humor – we all know the consequences of all work and no play. Despite this personality type's severe-sounding nature, humor is a common trait, and many comedians have this planet/sign placing. The Mercury/Capricorn type is prepared to spend time on education to achieve more professionally, and considers planning this important. People with this combination communicate well with the public, they could be successful and find recognition in politics and social or community work. Just as Mercury Capricornians require recognition and achievement, they also respect authority. Often this admiration, coupled with a desire to see tangible outcomes, can be taken to extremes, and involve name-dropping and the cultivation of the company of influential people to enhance personal prestige.
mercury_capricorn.reading: When this card is drawn, it indicates that hard, conscientious work is required in order to achieve long-term aims or solve an immediate problem.
mercury_capricorn.events: A need for extreme patience; discussion about discipline and control; taking a position of responsibility; working with someone famous.

mercury_aquarius.name: Originality
mercury_aquarius.image_description: The star and the bird in flight indicate hope and higher inspiration. The machine shows the complex reality that can evolve from the first transient flight of imagination.
mercury_aquarius.personal: The thoughts of Mercury/Aquarius people are constantly open to new experiences and ways of seeing. Those with such revolutionary minds display an ability to be unbiased, truthful and objective. They have little time for traditional socially acceptable ideas that conflict with the facts or first-hand experience. The ability of such people to turn ideas on their head and see situations from a new angle produces flashes of inspiration and great originality. The Aquarian's freshness of thought owes a lot to the fact that little surprises him or her. People with this aspect read well and learn well, but above all, require good mental stimulation. The ability of Mercury/Aquarians to see ideas in the broadest terms leads to a great interest in humanitarianism, and an urge to seek a better life for all less fortunate people. Mercury Aquarians also display a constant interest in the innovative, especially new technology, and it is not unusual for them to have some ability in this field. A concern with scientific investigation is of paramount importance to this character type, and leads Mercury Aquarians into unorthodox disciplines that would worry more conservative beings. The negative aspect of this combination is eccentricity taken to the extreme, when ideas become so outlandish that there is no basis for communication.
mercury_aquarius.reading: When this card is drawn, it demands that the questioner takes a lateral view and finds a new approach.
mercury_aquarius.events: A new approach, an idea that necessitates drastic change; an unusual research result; a shock announcement; an invention/innovation.

mercury_pisces.name: Inspiration
mercury_pisces.image_description: A draped figure dances, one arm raised to the heavens, the other to earth in a linking of the spiritual and material dimensions. A Sun face with closed eyes shines palely above a stone building.
mercury_pisces.personal: The Mercury/Pisces combination indicates an extremely vivid imagination that finds it easy to visualize thoughts and ideas, and reveals a personality type with a natural ability to please others. Highly intuitive, almost telepathic on the unconscious level, people with this planet/sign combination have an imaginative talent that could be profitable in creative or artistic worlds – many writers and creative artists have this aspect. Poets, writers, or not, Mercury Pisceans have the ability to add imaginatively to the world around them. They arrive at conclusions through intuitive perception rather than logical reasoning, like a psychic sponge soaking up the feelings and thinking of others. Mercury Pisceans have a tendency to be secretive about their inner thoughts and ideas, and an excessive use of their natural ability to dwell on fantasies may lead to flights of neurotic escapism. Positively, they can put this ability to imaginative use if they dare share their imaginative thoughts with others. The combination of Mercury and Pisces produces a constantly fertile mind that can jump from one fantastic idea to the next with ease: ideal for storytelling or when one needs to tune into the thoughts and needs of others.
mercury_pisces.reading: In a reading, this card shows that there is an instinctive answer to the question if the enquirer will open up to his or her inner vision. It indicates that the questioner already knows the answer but refuses to face up to it.
mercury_pisces.events: Inspired writing, imaginative storytelling, inventing excuses, constructing a dream world, confused or wishful thinking.

venus_aries.name: Lust
venus_aries.image_description: The unadorned figure is the object of desire, the fiery volcano symbolizes Aries' sudden outburst of energy. The chameleon changes color to become whatever is required in order to achieve its aims.
venus_aries.personal: Someone with the Venus/Aries combination of love and self-will demands a great deal of personal attention and will compete in partnership matters with enormous enthusiasm. Willful, unstable, affectionate and imbued with a healthy lust for love and life, people with this planet/sign combination are impulsive in matters of relationships and good taste: what, or who Venus Arians choose, they are determined to get. These personality types are cheerful and positive, and have great enthusiasm and sparkle. Their warm-hearted, pleasant and friendly nature wins many loyal friends and guarantees loyalty in return. Socially, Venus Arians are comfortable and competent, with a manner that carries them successfully through most tricky situations. With these qualities, they can make good business and romantic contacts: competitive instincts make the Venus Arians want the best – and the best they will have. As with all Venus aspects, this card suggests some artistic creativity. If these fiery Venusians are not artistic themselves, they will have the ability to surround themselves with artistic and talented friends. Appearances are important to Venus Arians, and they take a great deal of trouble to look good wherever they see themselves on show.
venus_aries.reading: When this card is drawn, it indicates a need to assert oneself – and yet to do this with the utmost warmth and charm. The hard hand in a velvet glove may be the answer.
venus_aries.events: A brief wild love affair; a love battle, a fighting sparring relationship, a love challenge.

venus_taurus.name: Romance
venus_taurus.image_description: A romantic image of a happy and devoted young couple who dance accompanied by Cupid. This represents love, beauty, art and romance in its most ideal form.
venus_taurus.personal: Here, Venus sits in its natural sign, Taurus. The green planet and the green sign are both concerned with the beautiful, pleasurable things in life, and this card indicates affections that are constant, lasting and stable. Venus Taureans love comfort, luxury and beautiful surroundings, and direct their attention to achieving them – for this character, social status is based on wealth or artistic ability. People with this planet/sign combination are possessive and happy to be possessed themselves, though, with their undoubted moneymaking skills, can take this to extremes, becoming over-indulgent and greedy. Venus Taureans are good with physical and sensual contact, and for this reason do not just make good lovers, they can extend their talents to the hands-on arts. Modeling and sculpture come easy to the natives of this planet/sign aspect, who have an expert feeling for the value of material things. Many singers have this Venus placing, and even Venus Taureans not blessed with this talent usually have a pleasing voice. Venus Taureans are great romantics, but consider a little opulence better than love in a garret, and can be wildly extravagant when impressing a loved one.
venus_taurus.reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, it usually indicates for the questioner a pleasurable forthcoming event, probably with a little monetary gain attached. The best business-relationship bet will succeed if concerned with one of the arts.
venus_taurus.events: A love affair, a fortunate marriage, living happily in comfort, gaining through a love relationship; a windfall or gift from someone close.

venus_gemini.name: Flattery
venus_gemini.image_description: The god Janus whose two faces look towards past and future. Here, it symbolizes the Gemini quality of talking to one person while listening to another's conversation. The spreading plant suggests the multiplicity of the Venus in Gemini nature.
venus_gemini.personal: Venus Geminians need variety in their romantic life. If they have to settle down (and they are not the best people to do this), it must be with someone as changeable as them. Friends with everyone, they can maintain devotion to one person as long as the conversation and wit flows readily. Good, stimulating conversation with loved ones and friends is of paramount importance to the people this card describes: Venus/Gemini types do need, also, a great deal of freedom, and tend to spread their affections. With a versatile ability to be all things to all people, there is a tendency for people with this planet/sign combination to say things for the sake of winning attention. Indeed, words are of more importance than deeds to the Venus Geminian, and the smooth tongue and the cleverly phrased compliment may become a well-used and manipulative talent. Never averse to telling little white lies in order to smooth the pathway to better things, they flatter and cajole to make life more pleasing. A love for literature, art and creative work means that Venus/Gemini people seek out friends with connections in these fields. In fact, such characters probably have talent in these directions themselves.
venus_gemini.reading: When this card shows up in a reading, it usually indicates to the questioner that a little amenable smooth talk will achieve far more in the current situation than a competitive wrangle.
venus_gemini.events: A secret love affair, an imagined romance, two lovers at a time, a deceptive courtship; constant need for company.

venus_cancer.name: Birth
venus_cancer.image_description: The angel of birth above a newborn baby. The rocky cavern suggests the hard, protective shell of Cancer. Above, the Sun and Moon safeguard the birth. The two sigils represent the Seal of Venus and the Spirit of Venus.
venus_cancer.personal: The Venus/Cancer combination describes someone with deeply sensitive romantic feelings. People with this planet/sign aspect need stability and security in relationships, and demonstrable shows of affection are essential to their well-being. They care for the loved ones and things around them, and expect to be equally cherished in return. With Venus in this sign, the inevitable result of a perfect liaison would be to set up home and produce a family. The desire to feed, protect and nurture a happy home of children is foremost with this card. The home will be comfortably cluttered, as possessions are kept and cared for in the same way as family. Venus/Cancer personality types are good entertainers in their own home, and having friends to visit is an important part of their home life. They spend time and care on making their environment look and feel aesthetically comfortable. The same goes for the garden, and the Venus/Cancer combination is an indication of quite good taste in matters of interior and exterior style. The negative side of this combination is that the person described can become overpoweringly smothering and possessive.
venus_cancer.reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, it may indicate a birth or other addition to the family. It can also show a need to make contact with one's mother or more general family roots in order to discover the answer to the question asked.
venus_cancer.events: The birth of a child, an adoption or increase in the family; celebration of an anniversary; a reunion with childhood friends.

venus_leo.name: Affair
venus_leo.image_description: Two cherubs caress; they are adults acting as children. It is a scene of innocent and irresponsible love of life and pleasure. Above, stars and hearts fly like a fantasy firework show.
venus_leo.personal: Where affections are concerned, Venus Leos are ardent, warm-hearted and dramatic. Their natural approach is lavish, generous and usually over-the-top – they live life to the full, and what style they have when they feel positive! Born romantic, Venus lions prefer situations full of drama and excitement, and what could be more attractive than the flirtatious thrill of a full-blown love affair. Despite having a tendency to stray and succumb to generous flattery, people with this planet/sign combination are strongly loyal to those lucky enough to earn their affections. Pleasure and luxury are vital to Venus Leos if they are to retain their naturally sunny outlook. Any relationship must contain vast amounts of admiration and adoration – in both directions – and then all is well. Without this mutual admiration, we find one grumpy old lion snarling at everyone. With Leo being the creative sign, the arts will be important in the life of Venus Leos, and it is likely that they have a special talent in this direction. They feel a great need to be involved with artistic or creative endeavors, even if only as an entrepreneur directing operations. Children will be prominent in any Leo life, and it is easy for them to let their hair down and make good friends among the very youngest.
venus_leo.reading: In a reading, this card shows that a new stimulus to creative endeavors will enter the life of the questioner. The card may suggest a new craze or interest, even a new love.
venus_leo.events: A deep dramatic love affair; a showy lifestyle, excessive luxury and extravagance; show business.

venus_virgo.name: Discrimination
venus_virgo.image_description: A woman, her hair garlanded, walks barefoot in the neat countryside. She reaches out towards the many butterflies. A small fox barks. Virgo cares for and rules smaller, more delicate creatures.
venus_virgo.personal: For Venus/Virgo types romantically, it is important that partners share their intellectual interests. People with this planet/sign combination may be in danger of analyzing their emotions to excess, though when positively directed, this ability can be helpful to others in the form of relationship counseling. Their close friends are few, but selectively chosen. The Venus/Virgo personality type shows great discrimination in choosing on whom and what to bestow their affections. When this is taken to extremes in a negative way, it can make them downright picky about potential friends and lovers. In many areas of life, however, this fastidious attitude stands this personality type in good stead. With a little more Venus extravagance added to the careful Virgo temperament, this person will make an excellent cook. Something to do with nourishment, pleasure and Virgo perfectionism combines to make a great but ever-modest chef or host. Virgos always show love in practical ways. Many of their social activities or romantic interests revolve around work or health. They may also be involved with artistic or alternative pursuits. It is important that the work surroundings of the Venus/Virgoan are harmonious and beautiful, or life can get twitchy. They display good taste in clothes, and this aspect features in the birth charts of many fashion designers.
venus_virgo.reading: When this card is picked, it shows the need to be ultra-selective, using all powers of discretion to attain aims.
venus_virgo.events: A close friendship that may develop further; a total makeover; a love affair with someone at work.

venus_libra.name: Indecision
venus_libra.image_description: Libra lies between the gentle perfection of Virgo and the dramatic emotions of Scorpio. The constellation of the virgin contrasts with the sting of the scorpion. The hourglass shows time, representing the eternal Libran dilemma in finalizing a decision.
venus_libra.personal: In Libra, Venus is at home, as this is the sign she rules in company with Taurus.
