Whereas Taurus is concerned with the pleasure of material possessions, for Libra, people are of utmost importance. All Librans work hard at keeping their relationships harmonious and balanced. Sociable and popular, they do most things best in teamwork and partnerships. Environment is important to people with this personality type, too: even on a limited budget they are able to make their home surroundings tasteful and pleasant. A love of harmony taken to extreme, however, can lead to a constant attitude of giving-in to achieve peace, and given too many alternatives in matters of relationships, the Venus Libran will waffle interminably before making a decision. Fortunately, people with this combination usually make a very happy marriage, often with someone they can look on as both friend and lover. The social abilities of Venus Librans provide them with good opportunities for dealing with the public, and work in liaison and personnel areas could be profitable. This planet/sign combination also has a very strong link with the world of music and with musicians.
venus_libra.reading: If this card is drawn, it suggests that the questioner has come to a stage at which a decision is imperative. There has been much dithering back and forth over an important matter, and now the time has come to be firm and take the consequences.
venus_libra.events: A large social gathering, a wedding; a difficult decision to make; a business partnership in the arts, an artist lover.

venus_scorpio.name: Secrets
venus_scorpio.image_description: The inscrutable winged sphinx – the head of a ram indicating the Martian link with the sign of Aries – is a symbol of the deep secrets of the past. Surrounding the sphinx are knots, glyphs and keys to many mysteries.
venus_scorpio.personal: In matters of love, Venus in Scorpio is the hot-house. In the opposite sign to its natural home, Taurus, the gentle nature of Venus becomes an emotional fireball. In romantic life, people with this planet/sign aspect are passionate, loyal and strongly sexed. Their reactions are emotional and desires are intense; they are also secretive, and do not talk about their inner emotional life easily. This card describes someone who idealizes friends and loved ones, and makes sacrifices for them without a second thought. Let-downs can turn all this to cold indifference – even vindictiveness with the extreme nature of this personality. The artistic side of Venus in Scorpio can manifest in strong dramatic contrasts. Often, it indicates interest in the inner mysteries and occult arts. There is a suggestion of financial gain through marriage or partnership with this card; it can also hint at an inheritance. On occasions, this placing of Venus reveals a highly sensuous nature or over-emphasis on sex. The sexual drive of Venus Scorpios is powerful, and if not overly sensuous, they do best with a creative outlet for that pent-up energy. Often, this combination indicates the withdrawal of emotional response over a long time, perhaps in a period of celibacy.
venus_scorpio.reading: When one receives this card in a reading, it usually indicates that a deep secret is being held by the questioner or is being hidden from them by someone very close.
venus_scorpio.events: A secret liaison, a secret love, a passionate love affair; money comes to a partner, a shared inheritance; an expression of extreme jealousy.

venus_sagittarius.name: Flirtation
venus_sagittarius.image_description: A traveling minstrel serenades a beautiful young huntress. The lute symbolizes the pleasure-loving nature of Venus, and the bow the far-seeking adventurousness of Sagittarius.
venus_sagittarius.personal: When Venus is in Sagittarius, it describes someone who is philosophical and fair, honest and true in relationships. In contrast to the nature of the preceding sign, Venus in Scorpio (see page 77) which is secretive and brooding, Sagittarius is open and free-speaking with regard to love matters. Venus Sagittarians share all thoughts with a loved one, even if sometimes they are a little too frank for comfort. Speaking the truth as they see it, they constantly have to be cautious that their honesty is not just too blunt. Venus Sagittarians are loyal, but need plenty of freedom within a relationship, and allow this to their partners, too. Saying what they think makes for a great deal of flirtatious conversation, which titillates the Sagittarian love of adventure. Close relationships with people from abroad are indicated by this card, and people with this aspect are attracted to the learned or worldly wise. In love, their ideals are high, and they might spend time trying to convert loved ones to their personal philosophy. Religious thought and action, in the broadest sense, could be prominent.
venus_sagittarius.reading: There is, when this card is selected in a reading, a possibility of marriage or a relationship with someone from another country. Often, this comes through a meeting at a university or other learning institution. Women who choose this card usually seek a heroic, adventurous kind of partner – a romantic Indiana Jones figure.
venus_sagittarius.events: A foreign lover or holiday romance that blossoms, a marriage abroad; a light-hearted flirtation just for the adventure.

venus_capricorn.name: Convention
venus_capricorn.image_description: A neat and well-cared-for traditional house stands proudly above an orderly garden. In the center is a child framed by a stone wall. A portrait of a child framed by a stone wall indicates family restrictions.
venus_capricorn.personal: Venus in the common-sense sign of Capricorn describes someone who needs a romantic partner to share and help them achieve ambitions. Disliking public displays of emotion, this planet/sign type is fairly conservative in behavior. Although this sounds dull, the Capricornian zany sense of humor prevails, keeping any relationship lively and entertaining. Often, the Venus in Capricorn card indicates a fair age difference in a major relationship. People with this aspect are loyal and steadfast, for financial security is very important to their emotional happiness. Love on an overdraft is not conducive to a Capricornian's well-being, and relationships can suffer if the partner is recklessly extravagant or foolish with money. There is always, with this sign, a strong social and artistic ambition. Venus Capricornians like to know and be known by the talented and successful. Their involvement in the arts world could be based on their own talents or be concerned with exploiting the creative abilities of others. The Venus/Capricorn love of artistic things usually leans toward the more conventional, expressing itself in classical music and traditional arts. The Venus/Capricorn type has good feelings for business dealings with the opposite sex, and harmony in this area is important to their life ambitions.
venus_capricorn.reading: When this card is chosen, it often indicates a romantic liaison with someone much older or younger.
venus_capricorn.events: A marriage or affair with a great age difference; a relationship with a famous or important person, a new friend of some influence.

venus_aquarius.name: Detachment
venus_aquarius.image_description: An intelligent person looks ahead with detached interest. The cranium is marked with a phrenological map showing areas of intellect. He is immersed in thought, unaware of the idyllic scene behind. The sea represents emotions.
venus_aquarius.personal: Basically, Aquarius/Venus people like to be friendly with everyone – but not too friendly. Not the most stable of partners, if, nevertheless, they find a stimulating and sociable relationship that allows them adequate freedom, in not too traditional a way, they will stick with it tenaciously. Plenty of intellectual stimulation is important for this planet/sign personality. They dislike jealousy and over-possessiveness, and soon tire of romantic partners who seek to encroach on their social freedom. Their taste inclines towards the unusual, with innovative art taking pride of place. Sexually they can in some cases be somewhat eccentric and promiscuous. Many of the acquaintances, friends and loved ones of Venus Aquarians will be creative and artistic. In long-term partnerships, they are more likely to marry someone who has been a good friend for quite a while. In fact friends becoming lovers and lovers becoming friends fit easily with their unconventional social attitude. People with this aspect flourish in group activities, especially where the group concerned is involved with an ideal or a particularly avant-garde philosophy. These are the people who can live quite easily in an ashram or commune.
venus_aquarius.reading: When this card is drawn in a reading it may indicate a detached feeling with regard to one's relationship. Negatively, it can mean that there is no means of making contact.
venus_aquarius.events: A sudden love affair with a friend; an unusual free-love relationship, an unusual or odd relationship; a couple living separate lives; an agreement between lovers.

venus_pisces.name: Submission
venus_pisces.image_description: A bird in a beautiful cage is placed in a decoratively draped window. Outside in the sky appearing as the sun is the glyph of Venus. The door of the cage is open, but the bird remains inside.
venus_pisces.personal: Venus/Pisces types are highly sensitive and imaginatively romantic: they can invent their own reality with regard to friends and loved ones. People with this planet/sign combination need physical demonstrations of love in regular doses, and are therefore susceptible to being fooled by insincerity. Some kind of artistic talent is usually indicated by this planet/sign aspect: it will blossom in a sensitive and appreciative environment. This higher dimension of the sign Pisces can manifest as a great talent for inspired artistic, poetic or musical works. With this gift, such people are able to tap into the universal unconscious, achieving great public success and expressing the spirit of their time. Highly sensitive and imaginatively romantic, they can idealize their loved ones. It would not be surprising if they had a fantasy or secret love or lover at some time in life. The Venus Piscean's underlying kindness towards, and sympathy with, others, constantly demands someone or something on which to be lavished. However, people with this personality type are extremely vulnerable to emotional bullies, so need to be extra-selective with their compassion.
venus_pisces.reading: Often when this card is drawn, it indicates a social shyness that leads to isolation and romantic frustration. This in turn may cause feelings of martyrdom and become sublimated into religious or spiritual expression. For some people, though, it can represent a genuine love of solitude and quiet.
venus_pisces.events: Feeling caught in a love trap; giving in for a quiet life, staying in an awkward situation easily left.

mars_aries.name: Impulsiveness
mars_aries.image_description: A wild figure on horseback gallops as if in a race. The symbol to the left is one of the greater seals symbolizing the six steps of creation, and is a protector of all things. The horseshoe symbolizes good fortune, resembling the bowl-like crescent of the waxing Moon.
mars_aries.personal: Mars is the ruling planet for Aries, and so here it sits in its natural fiery element. This planet/sign combination describes people who are energetic and impulsive in their every action. They feel a need to get things done, and this leads them to start numerous new projects. Acting before thinking inevitably leads to disasters, but these Martians are resilient and wins always predominate over losses. People described by this card are somewhat competitive and display a need to be seen in a leading position. Basically, they are outgoing and feel more comfortable at the front than with group endeavors. These Martians are natural leaders and take on this role within any situation which requires positive action. Mars/Aries people take great pride in their abilities, and are not happy unless they do more, and quicker, than anyone else. There is, however, a belligerence in the Mars/Aries nature that can go over the top, and these characters may ride roughshod over other people in order to get their own way. Mars/Aries personalities are at their best when they realize through experience that their potential for power works a great deal more effectively when they exert discreet control.
mars_aries.reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, it shows that some kind of physical and/or competitive action is necessary for the well-being of the person asking the question.
mars_aries.events: A challenge that requires courage, proving oneself by tackling the unknown, acting on impulse in a sudden situation; leading others with enthusiasm into a new venture.

mars_taurus.name: Defense
mars_taurus.image_description: Three mounted warriors, horses reined-in, take a defensive stance against attack. The Taurean image on the coin links positive action with material possessions. Six swords arranged in a pattern suggest they are there to impress, not to use.
mars_taurus.personal: Much of the energy in the Mars/Taurus nature is devoted to the acquisition of material things. This card describes practical, determined people who will fight for and defend that which they deem important in life. People with this planet/sign combination take their time in making choices, but once the decision is made, there is no going back. Nobody is going to take away what belongs to the Mars Taurean – and if he or she gives things away, credit is required. Despite having a materialistic outlook, Mars Taureans can be incurable romantics, and rarely forget to keep the pleasure-loving part of life alive. They do not like to waste energy, and believe that skillful methods and techniques are worth more than brute force. Mars/Taurus types have a great ability to see the potential in the most ordinary things, transforming them with slow but sustained encouragement into objects of worth. For Mars Taureans, the option of running their own business is attractive. If they do, the chances of success are high, since a competitive streak makes them give of their best when completely responsible for their own finances. Negatively, this placing of Mars can indicate a ruthless and mercenary approach to life; in which all actions are guided by financial outcome.
mars_taurus.reading: When this card is dealt in a reading, it shows a need to defend something the questioner values.
mars_taurus.events: Starting up a new business, playing the stock market, a quick business deal with a profit; a possession that makes a leap in value; beating a competitor.

mars_gemini.name: Decision
mars_gemini.image_description: The chessboard symbolizes the mind and the attacking position the nature of the competitive planet Mars. The winged wheel denotes the Sun god, and movement in the element air or high mental activity. The doorway challenges a move into unknown territory.
mars_gemini.personal: Most Mars/Gemini actions involve mental work and often manual dexterity too. Mars and Gemini alike are fast-moving factors in traditional astrology; neither planet nor sign can endure waiting around for things to happen, and both require quick action. This planet/sign combination indicates someone who is good in argument and debate, and brilliant at the quick verbal comeback. When it comes to sharp and aggressive repartee, Mars/Gemini types can lash with the tongue a little better than most. In fact, most of their battles are fought verbally. Such people display much inventiveness and ingenuity in their activities, which usually involve doing more than one job at a time. Often this placing of Mars indicates great versatility in work with the hands as well as with the mind. Coupled with Gemini's ability to do many things at the same time, it would be surprising if people with this aspect did not have a good, physical manipulative talent to add to their mental skills. Mars Geminians have a lot of energy to expend in rushing around gathering information, references or just good old-fashioned gossip, and are a source of information for all who enquire: if they don't know the answer personally, they know someone who does. If this person is not a professional reporter, he or she makes a good amateur.
mars_gemini.reading: When this card is drawn, it indicates the need to make a quick decision, but bear in mind that speed is not the most important factor.
mars_gemini.events: A heated argument, cross-questioning someone; a fight over a contract; a regretted letter.

mars_cancer.name: Quarrel
mars_cancer.image_description: Two mounted figures squabble over a gold ring symbolizing betrothal. This image concerns families united or divided over relationships or inheritance. The classical busts glare at each other, reminders that this has happened before.
mars_cancer.personal: Mars Cancerians most enjoy expending energy and being active around the home or in a family-type business. However, the bossy nature of Mars cannot resist the temptation to take over and run things. In a family situation, this often leads to interminable and highly emotional disputes and arguments. The gentle sign of Cancer is not the most comfortable place to find pushy, aggressive Mars, and this card can indicate domestic upheaval. Mars acts immediately, and in the close atmosphere of home life, this causes much combative argument. Family matters will be stormy if Mars Cancerians try to get everyone to do things their way. The tricky situation to negotiate is that the Mars/Cancer person wants to be boss but also wants to be loved. It is best if people with this planet/sign type avoid bottling up emotions, as worries cause stomach upsets. Property can be important to the people this card describes, perhaps meaning more to them than just a place of their own. Home improvements are a constant demand on Mars Cancerians, and running some kind of business of their own, however modest, can offer a better outlet for Martian energy than quarreling. Mars Cancerians have a natural talent for property development, and can be lucky with real-estate deals given the slightest opportunity.
mars_cancer.reading: When this card is selected, it usually shows that all is not well in the family nest.
mars_cancer.events: A continuing family row, a family estrangement, fighting over an inheritance; a divorce or a problem involving custody.

mars_leo.name: Egotism
mars_leo.image_description: A strange bird – half-cockerel, half-man – crowned, stands proudly for all to see. Above is the Leo Sun and a royal Egyptian scarab to show the eminent position of the cockerel.
mars_leo.personal: The fiery planet Mars in the fiery sign Leo indicates that people with this planet/sign aspect will be most fulfilled using their energy in expansive and showy creative ways. Doing things on a big scale has appeal for this character, more especially if an audience is involved. The tendency to take over and lead others is also strong for this personality type. This dynamic combination of planet and sign inevitably indicates a powerful mutual attraction with the opposite sex. Mars Leos have a strong sex drive that needs plenty of activity and appreciation. A great deal of this drive and passion could manifest itself as creative talent, and would be worthwhile developing. Competitive sports and games have great appeal to people with this planet/sign combination, and they usually have a talent for working with children in an entertaining or creative way. With Leo's entrepreneurial abilities, this card often indicates a talent for coaching the young in sports – at which Mars Leos can excel. The need for appreciation and admiration is strong, however, and the Mars/Leo personality makes for a great deal of showing off and over-the-top behavior. Negatively, this may appear to others as authoritative and dictatorial.
mars_leo.reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, questioners are advised to look at themselves and their current behavior with regard to the question. The Egotism card may indicate that they need to be less bullying and to do more to earn the respect of others.
mars_leo.events: A dramatic performance, a great creative enterprise; forcing oneself into the lead, bullying others.

mars_virgo.name: Criticism
mars_virgo.image_description: A blue eye stares fixedly at an arrangement of flowers in a simple basket. Above, a finger points accusingly at the necklace of a woman who has a hair-braid made of wheat.
mars_virgo.personal: Mars/Virgo energy can find a good outlet in skilled work and craftsmanship. Many people with this planet/sign combination are attracted to medicine, and especially areas such as surgery in which great care and precision is necessary. They also often are skilled with machinery and motors. If the occupation of the Mars Virgoan does not allow this ability for precision or detail work to be expressed, it can manifest and provide great satisfaction as a specialist spare-time interest. Virgo always like to plan things carefully, not liking to fritter away energies, and although Mars usually provides an excess of energy, in this sign it is well-directed and never wasted. This card indicates a propensity for success and even prominence in work for a well-run organization, probably in areas in which analysis and study of health, medicine, complementary healing or dietary control is important. Mars Virgoans tend to be perfectionists, and may set themselves impossible standards. In extreme cases, there is a danger that they can make themselves uncomfortable or even ill with this self-inflicted pressure. Often, it manifests in superficial behavior towards others, picking on faults to compensate for what the Mars Virgoan feels to be his or her own failure.
mars_virgo.reading: In a reading, this card indicates a need to be more critical in providing the answer to the question, or, conversely, that one is being overly critical to the detriment of the situation.
mars_virgo.events: A co-operative research project; a position of responsibility in a large organization, a personal assistant to an important person.

mars_libra.name: Choice
mars_libra.image_description: There are two women. One, blindfolded, is Justice and holds the scales; the other watches the swing of the balance. The rose weighs the beauty of the flower against the sharpness of the thorns. The leg symbol suggests difficulty in movement.
mars_libra.personal: Libra is the opposite sign to Aries, the natural sign of Mars (see page 84), and so this planet/sign combination always brings with it strong mood swings. People with this aspect focus a great deal of energy into co-operative and partnership work. They appreciate the company of energetic people and throw themselves into group projects with enthusiasm. They play by the rules and expect the same from others. The competitive nature of Mars combined with the diplomatic qualities of Libra means that the people this card describes probably need a good argument to release pressure. Though they like partnerships, Mars Librans do, however unconsciously, see themselves as the boss on a competitive level. They tend, in fact, to pick themselves sparring partners. As long as their chosen ones know the rules of the game, all is well, but if they do not, the ride may be a stormy one. As with all matters of the Balance, once the scales are tipped, there will undoubtedly be a great deal of swinging back and forth in every activity these personality types embark on. Many Mars/Libra actions are taken on impulse where they concern others, and people with this planet/sign aspect must be prepared to make a few grand mistakes. Tact and diplomacy may come a little harder with the red planet in this sign, but are more likely to succeed in the end.
mars_libra.reading: When this card appears, it always indicates a difficult choice to be made.
mars_libra.events: A deliberate change of direction; a business merger, choosing between two partners or diverse business options.

mars_scorpio.name: Revenge
mars_scorpio.image_description: A heroic figure holds an enemy's head. His nakedness shows vulnerability, the helmet and sword his warrior rank. A winged figure brings a fiery torch in honor of the action. Above, two lovers, Sun and Moon, embrace.
mars_scorpio.personal: Mars is the old ruler of Scorpio, and those with this planet/sign combination need to be faced with a real challenge to warrant putting their great energy into action. Once they believe a thing to be worthwhile, however, the amount of sheer energy they make available to achieve their aim is phenomenal. But there is a danger that the current passion of a Mars/Scorpio personality can be used to bulldoze and overpower other people. The temper of people with this planet/sign aspect will always be a little over the top; they never remain in the grey area in the middle when one of two extreme positions can be chosen. All or nothing are Mars/Scorpio personalities! They strongly invest their desires and emotional intensity in every action, and make available a great deal of aggressive drive for joint ventures. Mars Scorpions have the power to transform or change almost impossible situations, and in fact may well do this several times during the course of their life. Devotedly loyal to those they choose to spend their life with, Mars/Scorpio types are equally passionate in hating those who slight them in any way, in a case of don't get mad, get even!
mars_scorpio.reading: When this card is selected in a reading, extreme action is at least a possibility in the current situation. As long as one is able to use this potential in a controlled way, the outcome can be positive.
mars_scorpio.events: A phenomenal achievement, extreme effort in order to overcome some kind of problem; getting even with someone, an over-the-top reaction to a perceived hurt.

mars_sagittarius.name: Domination
mars_sagittarius.image_description: Two naked young men wrestle in a field outside a solid-looking house. One has forced the other into a yielding position to the point of defeat. Above are the three symbols of the great religions descended from the prophet Abraham.
mars_sagittarius.personal: Mars Sagittarians devote a great deal of energy to crusading and the conversion of others to their beliefs. Staunch defenders of the truth, they can be a little blunt in putting their case to others. Because of the excessive power in this planet/sign combination, some sporting or adventurous activity benefits people with this aspect at every stage of life. Foreign travel could be a satisfactory outlet for pioneering energies, and it would be surprising if Mars Sagittarians did not spend some time abroad, or with people from another country. Active participation in some religious or philosophical cause is indicated by this card. Negatively, this can manifest as a narrow and limited view of life into which the Mars Sagittarian tries to shoehorn everyone – not a winning strategy in the popularity stakes. As long as Mars Sagittarians do not get too dogmatic and can maintain an "it-takes-all-sorts" attitude, all is well. With Mars in Sagittarius, the competitive instinct is irrepressible, and the need to come out on top in any situation can become excessive.
mars_sagittarius.reading: When this card is chosen in a reading it can mean, depending on the question asked, that either the questioner is being pressured by someone or is applying too much pressure to someone else. The Domination card indicates a need to stand back and detach oneself in order to see the truth of a situation.
mars_sagittarius.events: An argument over ideals; persuading others by bullying; the start of an expedition; reckless optimism with regard to a long-term project; competitive sports.

mars_capricorn.name: Authority
mars_capricorn.image_description: A king stands firm, holding symbols of authority and power. The orb with the globe topped by a cross represents traditionally the church's power over the world. Here, the cross is the equal-sided cross of earth: the power of the material world challenges the spiritual.
mars_capricorn.personal: Those people with Mars in Capricorn have great energy when it is channeled into professional ambitions, and have a strong desire for recognition and status. The actions of Mars/Capricorn people are always well considered and decisive. Not given to rushing into things willy-nilly, their energies are rarely wasted on impulsive and costly mistakes. They show initiative and the executive ability that makes practical achievements possible. This placing of Mars gives undoubted potential for constructive and energetic leadership in whichever field Mars/Capricorn people make their own. The negative side of this card can manifest as a "power-at-all-costs" attitude where career and ambition are concerned. In such situations, Mars Capricornians have little care for those pushed aside in their own drive for achievement. However, this attitude rarely results in the kind of recognition that Mars/Capricorn types find important for fulfillment. Fortunately, the fiery planet Mars is usually tempered in the sign of Capricorn, and power is applied with a great deal of common sense and control, which manifests as responsible action.
mars_capricorn.reading: When this card appears, it can indicate a need for the questioner to take control of the situation by asserting authority. Alternatively, it may be necessary to seek the help of a person in power.
mars_capricorn.events: Ambitious moves requiring great self-control; being in a position of power over less reliable people; a lonely job with great responsibility; seeking help from someone in a position of authority.

mars_aquarius.name: Rebellion
mars_aquarius.image_description: A walled fortress town sits solid and secure beneath dark and brooding clouds. Above, a young warrior challenges with his sword two giant bearded nobles symbolizing tradition and established authority.
mars_aquarius.personal: Freedom of action is of utmost importance to Mars/Aquarius. Rarely following old methods blindly, people with this planet/sign combination do things their way, which is probably in a quite innovative and unorthodox style. Mars Aquarians happily expend their energies on the new, novel and scientific, and they have a natural talent with gadgets which could develop into genuine inventive talent. However it goes, Mars Aquarians will invent something. The company of friends is of enormous importance to people with this aspect, and they are more likely to be strong, energetic and male – willing supporters too. People described by this card are probably not quiet when it comes to showing their discontent with outmoded or unfair social attitudes, and it is hard to find Mars Aquarians who do not have a good humanitarian cause to battle for. The Mars Aquarian's odd-ball outlook on life makes it easy for them to examine anything established or traditional to see whether its rules and regulations are still viable. They are rarely afraid to express views that are not the norm, and show great courage in following their beliefs against all odds in order to overturn a situation which they believe is unfair or illogical.
mars_aquarius.reading: Receiving this card in a reading indicates a need for a lateral approach to the question. Turn the current thinking on its head and approach it from a different angle – a drastic change of thought is needed.
mars_aquarius.events: Leading a protest, expressing discontent with authority, the courage to be different; anger over indifference.

mars_pisces.name: Escape
mars_pisces.image_description: A woman in a chariot pulled by tigers escapes from something she has to turn back and see. Servants accompany her flight. On the seal above, a boy rides a dolphin, symbol of the power of the sea. The Buddha suggests escape from the material world.
mars_pisces.personal: Those people with the Mars/Pisces combination are dedicated to understanding, sympathy and sacrifice. They use their idealistic energies in visionary and sensitive ways. A great deal of their powers are thrown into the development of the Piscean imagination, which, if they are fortunate to be able to share it with others, becomes a very fulfilling part of life. If Mars Pisceans have the necessary ability to develop their imaginations as an artistic talent, they will have unlimited scope for creativity. People with this planet/sign combination always feel a great need to help others in caring ways. This may involve working in positions and situations in which they take on a supportive, background role, and often this card indicates work for or within a large institution, usually in one of the caring professions. The Mars in Pisces combination highlights a personality that can be somewhat secretive, and could involve a secret love, a plot or even hidden enemies.
mars_pisces.reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, it may show that the questioner's desire to please others to the exclusion of personal needs has placed him or her within a complex and uncomfortable relationship or situation. Mars in Pisces is very rarely a fighting aspect and more often than not, eventually, when all other options fail, leads one to escape from a situation by any means available.
mars_pisces.events: Using great energy to extract oneself from a tricky situation; working extremely hard for the benefit of others; shutting one's eyes to the reality of a situation.

jupiter_aries.name: Enterprise
jupiter_aries.image_description: The hand diagram of the chiromancers shows the complete set of planetary qualities. Jupiter's nature in palmistry is to denote the achievement of enterprise and ambition, where full use is made of all talents available. The acorns are simply the seeds of potential.
jupiter_aries.personal: Jupiter in Aries people have an expansive drive to develop and improve life by taking on positions of leadership. Positive action and an enjoyment of physically doing things are a necessary part of their make-up. Jupiter/Aries types tend to "rush in where angels fear to tread," but all positive effort on their part is good for their well-being. Yes, these types are extremely impulsive, but with the beneficial planet Jupiter involved, they get more than their fair share of lucky breaks. Optimistic and self-assured socially, people with this planet/sign aspect are fortunate in sending out little signals of honest trustworthiness that make for plenty of popularity. They have the added quality of giving confidence to other people. The optimism of the people this card describes is based on the belief that the harsh old world around them will support their buoyant enthusiasm – and of course it does. They share this aspect with many actors, politicians and religious or philosophical leaders. Jupiter is a buoyant influence, and imparts to Aries the optimistic belief that all that one does will have a successful outcome. More often than not with this combination in play, the result can be just that.
jupiter_aries.reading: When this card occurs in a reading it signifies a successful consequence for ventures referred to in the question. The Enterprise card suggests that a bold and enterprising approach will be needed to achieve a satisfactory result.
jupiter_aries.events: Setting up a business; working for a foreign organization; using personality to improve one's status; enacting ideas for long-term success.

jupiter_taurus.name: Status
jupiter_taurus.image_description: A dignified couple, man and woman, are posed as if for a portrait. Above them, a crown hovers. The two lion-headed dragons are symbols of might and dignity. Below, elaborate brocades indicate riches.
jupiter_taurus.personal: In developing and improving life, Jupiter/Taureans gain much benefit from money and material resources. They are aware of the energy these items can generate, and have the ability to expand their worth for themselves and others. The health of people with this planet/sign combination suffers, however, if their love of material comforts becomes too excessive. Though the Jupiter Taurean's ability to make money will be blessed at times by extreme good fortune, the people this card describes have an occasional impulsive Jupiterian urge to blow their good luck on crazy bouts of excess and extravagance. They are better when they involve themselves with money-making ventures that cater for other people's luxurious desires. This planet/sign aspect indicates a taste for artistic things, and good judgment of the true value of art objects as an investment. Jupiter Taureans are, in fact, extremely good at sensing the market for anything artistic, beautiful or luxurious – in whichever direction their talents lie, there is much movement of money. Negatively, those who place emphasis on worldly achievements run the risk of being judged on the basis of material possessions. The ability to give as easily and skillfully as one acquires is the key to striking the balance.
jupiter_taurus.reading: When this card is drawn, it hints that one should be aware of priorities and question whether material gain is really most important at the moment.
jupiter_taurus.events: Gaining pleasure from beautiful things, extravagant taste, a generous love of art; using money to cultivate powerful friends.

jupiter_gemini.name: Bluff
jupiter_gemini.image_description: A Minoan goddess holds two butterflies – or are they really axes? The hands show back and front, as does the professional conjurer performing a sleight-of-hand trick.
jupiter_gemini.personal: The basic drive for Jupiter Geminians in improving life will always be to keep the mind active and informed. People with this combination have an intellectual curiosity that leads to continuing mental development at all stages of life. Often, they wish to be seen to know everything, and with their quick wit can collect enough information to bluff their way through any situation. Jupiter in Gemini people often achieve great knowledge and mental achievements without formal education, and this planet/sign combination can indicate the talented self-taught intellectual. Such people boost their experience with travel, and social relationships, which contribute to their mental expansion. Travel is beneficial for Jupiter Geminians, enriching the mind as well as relaxing the natural tension that accompanies their mental restlessness. Some form of meditation is of benefit when these hyperactive heads get dizzy. Contacts with close relatives are likely to be convivial for Jupiter Geminians. The people this card describes are good analysts of current thought, and perceptive social and political commentators.
jupiter_gemini.reading: In a reading, this card indicates a need to throw oneself into an unfamiliar situation or challenge and use one's wits to bluff through the first stage. This is not as dishonest an approach as it sounds. A brain surgeon has to make the first operation as confidently as if it were the fiftieth.
jupiter_gemini.events: A situation in which one has to impress others with knowledge; discussions about business or legal affairs; a lecture or talk to a group or society.

jupiter_cancer.name: Speculation
jupiter_cancer.image_description: Below, the Cancerian crab, its claws outstretched, touches the alchemical circle depicting the four elements that blend in universal creation. In the center an eye looks for opportunity. The king and queen signify marriage, tradition and stability.
jupiter_cancer.personal: In order to expand and develop their lives, people with Jupiter in Cancer feel a need to keep and develop their strong sense of family roots and traditions. This desire to be around and care for others may spread into work for the community at large, which may be seen as an extension of the family. Jupiter Cancerians also benefit from exploring their talent for historical research or for expanding their understanding of the past. The early family upbringing of people with the Jupiter/Cancer combination has usually been supportive and comfortable, and so they try to pass these qualities on to those surrounding them. If not inheritors of material possessions, they certainly inherit strong family traditions – and most usually both. Often people with Jupiter in Cancer receive a family inheritance that may become the basis for establishing a family business. People with this planet/sign combination usually have an excellent feeling for acquiring property, and for improving its value once in their ownership. Their own home may, at some time, be used for gatherings of a religious, philosophical or educational nature.
jupiter_cancer.reading: When this card is drawn during a reading, it encourages the questioner to look to his or her family for support and even financial help with regard to the question asked. The Speculation card is also a good indication of a successful outcome to an imminent property deal.
jupiter_cancer.events: A legal situation involving the home, running a family business from home; exploiting an inheritance to the benefit of the family.

jupiter_leo.name: Publicity
jupiter_leo.image_description: An angel reaches and touches the stars. She is Publicity, carrying the flag and spreading fame far and wide. She circles the small globe of the earth containing the four elemental colors: red-fire, green-earth, yellow-air and blue-water.
jupiter_leo.personal: In order for Jupiter Leos to develop and grow, they constantly need to find themselves in situations in which they can put on an impressive show. Jupiter Leos think bigger than most, and so have to take the lead if they want to get things done. Local events that need creative imagination and lavish ideas are waiting for their special talents. Plenty of socializing gives people with this planet/sign combination ample chance to radiate their natural warmth, but if they can find a creative job, then so much the better. Their creativity finds good opportunity for appreciation in any of the arts, and their talents, whether professional or amateur, grow as they mature. With this placing of Jupiter, gambling will be a temptation, and some discipline may be useful to rein-in over-optimism in this area. The children of Jupiter Leos, if they have any, are likely to be a source of great pride, and parents will spare no expense on their education. There is likely to be at least one creatively talented and successful offspring.
jupiter_leo.reading: Because of the Leo link with children, when this card is drawn in a reading, it can indicate the encouragement of a child in a creative expression of their talents. This can manifest negatively as the archetypal over-pushy mother of the child star, living out her fantasies of fame through her progeny. Positively, it can refer to a nurturing and supportive parent.
jupiter_leo.events: Blowing one's own trumpet; the attraction of some kind of fame or attention, taking a leading role in a local activity; a prominent member of the church or similar organization.

jupiter_virgo.name: Patience
jupiter_virgo.image_description: A gentlewoman strolls in her garden. She wears an elaborately and delicately embroidered dress. The ox and the lion look away from each other in peace. The classical heads are earth goddesses Circe and Gaia.
jupiter_virgo.personal: Jupiter Virgos expand their lives most when they can exploit their outstanding analytical and critical sense to the full. Excelling at detailed work, the talents of people with this planet/sign combination achieve most in some kind of specialist activity. Philosophically, people with this aspect are able to sift the truth from most arguments, but may have to watch their over-critical attitude to others who are less mentally endowed. Health and attention to diet is important to the well-being of Jupiter Virgoans. They have an innate understanding that mental and emotional states have a great deal to do with health, and demonstrate an ability to help others in this area. Consequently, Jupiter Virgos have the potential for developing abilities in healing, this being more likely within the spheres of complementary medicine or faith-healing. With the expansive planet Jupiter in the very modest and conscientious sign of Virgo, there is inevitably a conflict, and this may reveal itself as an excessive concentration on detailed work to the detriment of health. It also manifests as unassuming devotion to duty that is taken to extremes, or may show in obsessive behavior with regard to things such as cleanliness or tidiness.
jupiter_virgo.reading: When this card appears in a reading, it may show that the questioner should not be afraid to ask for assistance with a project.
jupiter_virgo.events: Acting as secretary for a social or self-help group; reorganizing the methods and system of an organization; spending time helping someone with a learning difficulty.

jupiter_libra.name: Negotiation
jupiter_libra.image_description: In a field before a small town stands a dark maiden from a distant land, her hands raised to provide a link between Sun and Moon, earth, emotions, creativity and possessions.
jupiter_libra.personal: People with Jupiter in Libra expand their lives through frequent interaction with others, gaining much from co-operative work and close personal relationships. Their strong concern for justice and moral principles gives these personality types useful diplomatic skills. Jupiter Librans have a talent for gentle persuasion that would be fulfilling and effective in social and charitable work of some kind. Desire to please others can, however, sometimes lead this personality to try to be all things to all people: often, people with this aspect promise more than they can deliver in order to please, and end up achieving the opposite result. This card usually indicates a strong and lasting marriage or relationship, and Jupiter Librans are also usually lucky enough to find themselves in the satisfying position of acquiring much material and spiritual well-being. Negatively, expansive Jupiter Librans need to take care not to get involved with grandiose schemes and speculative partnerships – they might wreck the good things they already have. The optimistic outlook Jupiter encourages may push Librans into unhelpful indecision, seeing equal value in every possibility.
jupiter_libra.reading: In a reading, the Negotiation card indicates that the time has come to make a decision, and that there is a need to consider the pros and cons of a situation to make sure the answer is acceptable to both parties.
jupiter_libra.events: Learning a language for a specific project; taking the chair at a meeting, being spokesperson for someone unjustly accused; negotiating a business deal; marriage guidance.

jupiter_scorpio.name: Manipulation
jupiter_scorpio.image_description: A powerful and magnetic priest or shaman stares penetratingly at the viewer. Above is an eight-pointed star representing the eighth house Scorpio, and on the headdress three six-pointed stars represent wisdom and enlightenment.
jupiter_scorpio.personal: Jupiter Scorpios expand and develop their lives through deep and passionate interests in psychology and mysticism, by which they explore the hidden secrets of life. The Jupiter Scorpio's passion for life's deeper subjects could develop into such things as life after death, reincarnation or spiritualism. Legal work or business may attract them, and they could gain from other people's finances, either through assistance or speculation. The ability to see and help develop other people's talents gives the Jupiter/Scorpio personality good possibilities in counseling or some kind of management work. People with this planet/sign aspect have the ability to discover other people's secrets – whether for altruistic or selfish reasons – and their magnetic and penetrating powers can be used almost hypnotically to achieve their objectives. Positively, Jupiter Scorpios could find themselves with the responsibility for helping others with their deepest problems, and this planet/sign combination can produce the devoted entrepreneur who supports and encourages prodigies with unfailing work. On the other hand, these are people who can persuade and seduce with their enormous charisma, leading others into whatever they desire.
jupiter_scorpio.reading: In a reading, this card may warn that one is following a false or manipulative person. Scorpio's natural rulership of the Eighth House shows a benefit from an inheritance or heirloom.
jupiter_scorpio.events: A difficult legal problem; persuasive promotion or propaganda for a person or project; detective work to prise out someone's secret.

jupiter_sagittarius.name: Principle
jupiter_sagittarius.image_description: Ruins represent the establishment of earlier times. The mitre is a symbol of spiritual power across centuries and countries. The constellation Noah's Dove with its prominent star Phact is ascribed to the nature of Jupiter and Saturn by Ptolemy.
jupiter_sagittarius.personal: With Jupiter in its own sign of Sagittarius, we see the perfect combination of planet and sign. For the lucky people with this aspect, the most satisfying way to enrich life is through broad, adventurous travel, both physically and mentally. Studying or living for a period within another culture is fulfilling for people described by this card, and a major philosophy or religion will form an important part of life, although this may manifest as psychology or politics. Jupiter Sagittarians can also be concerned with publishing, lecturing and teaching, but always connected with a strong set of ethics. These interests produce a far-sightedness that can manifest as "seeing into the future." Jupiter Sagittarians have a strong desire to acquire as much education as possible and take advantage of opportunities for involvement in mature studies – which can lead on to distinguished achievements. They are also, however, susceptible to involvement in extremist religious or philosophical beliefs. On the negative side, it is possible that people with this planet/sign combination may seek to impose their concepts on those around them to the extent that they develop a self-righteous attitude that rides roughshod over other views.
jupiter_sagittarius.reading: When this card appears in a reading, it will raise a matter of principle or life-philosophy that is particularly related to the question.
jupiter_sagittarius.events: Planning a grand tour or world trip; being completely immersed in a new philosophy or religion, conversion, the need to persuade others of a philosophy.

jupiter_capricorn.name: Control
jupiter_capricorn.image_description: The creator god Zeus/Jupiter, feet resting on the world, looks down at his work. Cherubim carry the canopy of the sky above the verdant earth. Below, the ouroboros, a serpent with its tail in its mouth, guards the earth, a symbol of time, eternity and the universe.
jupiter_capricorn.personal: People with Jupiter in Capricorn feel an ever-demanding ambition to improve life and status by taking on positions of responsibility. They find fruitful and satisfying areas of life in which they are able to exercise care and judgment in decision-making. Achievement is important for Jupiter/Capricorn well-being, and they aspire to positions of authority. Their achievements lead people with this planet/sign combination to take on a prominent position in the community – they have the potential to become a pillar of society – and a strong ethical or religious sense will be important to them, and to other people's image of them. This card reveals excellent prospects for public office and positions of power, however modest. There is always present a danger that ambition can interfere with home and family life, and this may become an area of conflict. The negative side of this card can be a stubborn sticking to the letter of the law in situations that demand a more flexible approach. This rigid attitude taken to extremes can also show as miserliness in small matters alongside excessive extravagance in large ones.
jupiter_capricorn.reading: When this card appears in a reading, it often indicates a need to take on full responsibility for one's current position and apply control in order to extricate oneself from a difficult situation.
jupiter_capricorn.events: Taking on a responsible position in an organization; achieving recognition for lengthy and patient work; a politician or business tycoon, a prominent figure in the religious community.

jupiter_aquarius.name: Innovation
jupiter_aquarius.image_description: Seated on a strange plant-stool, a female figure in unusual striped attire holds a whip-like instrument attached to a ball containing a nine-petaled flower. At the four corners are ankhs; three are the same shape; the fourth is different.
jupiter_aquarius.personal: In developing and enhancing life, Jupiter Aquarians gain a great deal through involvement with reforms, social organizations and good causes. The interests of their fellow humans are important to people with this planet/sign combination, and a code of ethics that is universal has great appeal. Unusual philosophies, religions or occult science will prove an attraction throughout life, since Jupiter Aquarians are broad-minded and always open to new ideas. Most of their life goals will be achieved with friends and in group activities as their concern for humanity at large tends to increase their popularity. The Jupiter/Aquarius interest in new ways of seeing and community activities enables people with this combination to carry out large and constructive endeavors with success. These may be of a charitable or humanitarian nature, carried out in the name of religious, educational or fraternal organizations. The negative side of this planet/sign combination can manifest as excessive changeability and eccentric behavior, to the extent that friends and partners learn not to rely on Jupiter Aquarians. Their minds can be so inventive and scattered that they diffuse their potential wastefully.
jupiter_aquarius.reading: In a reading, this card can indicate a totally new approach to a problem. It may involve the help of clever and talented friends as Aquarius rules the Eleventh House of friendship.
jupiter_aquarius.events: Work on an original idea, being involved with a new invention; an avant-garde group formed to benefit or educate others, using ingenuity to help the less fortunate.

jupiter_pisces.name: Seduction
jupiter_pisces.image_description: In the center, the first woman Eve is plucking the apple from the Tree of Knowledge. Before her is the constellation Cassiopeia, associated by Kabalists with the second Tarot trump, The High Priestess. Heart and flowers represent the mundane view of love.
jupiter_pisces.personal: Jupiter is the traditional ruler of Pisces, and people with this planet/sign position develop and improve life by championing the underdog and those less fortunate than themselves. Care, as always with the sympathetic Piscean, needs to be taken not to be undiscriminating in this respect, as people with this aspect could be susceptible to others taking advantage. Jupiter Pisceans are extremely sensitive to those around them, and may even have some psychic ability. Whether they do or not, some mystical or higher path will play an important part in life. They develop a strong interest in the inner spiritual path through seclusion and meditation, and mysticism and religious thought will be important. The emotional satisfaction that Jupiter/Pisces people derive from helping others may be a very deep and fulfilling experience, and though their work may be behind the scenes, it will be appreciated. People this card describes are, however, vulnerable to deception from those who seek to take advantage of their caring and sensitive nature. In its most negative aspect, this combination indicates people whose sensitivity to others and desire to please leads them into being seduced by any and every exploiter.
jupiter_pisces.reading: This card is a warning that everything may not be as it appears and that someone is being seduced for ulterior motives.
jupiter_pisces.events: Becoming the victim of a hard-luck story; sacrificing a great deal for someone who is loved; having the intuition and ability to sense what another person wants.

saturn_aries.name: Risk
saturn_aries.image_description: A boy, worldly possessions over his shoulder, bravely passes a menacing bear. The North American Indian fetish is a protection against danger. A key symbolizes Aries' boldness in opening doors, and a starred tree the fruits of Martian courage.
saturn_aries.personal: With the Saturn in Aries personality, individuality, initiative and activities which combine self-control and disciplined energetic work will make life achievements most possible. Saturn/Aries people rarely speak or act without having a definite decision in mind. They have good reasoning ability and are prepared to shoulder responsibility when necessary. People with this planet/sign combination are loners in that they, more often than not, prefer to get on with things without asking for the help or advice of others. For those with this aspect, there may be a call for great patience in situations in which the natural Arian desire for quick action is frustratingly restricted. The biggest danger comes when Aries' impetuosity gets the better of Saturn's restrictive common sense, and provokes risky actions that may or may not succeed: impetuous actions usually lead to frustrating hold-ups. In these instances, a good physical outlet for pent-up aggression comes in handy, such as the martial arts, in which discipline and natural energy combine.
saturn_aries.reading: When this card is drawn in a reading, it indicates a tendency to take everything too seriously and shows that allowing a sense of humor to express itself in the current situation will not denigrate conscientious work in any way. It is time to relax and take a measured risk.
saturn_aries.events: A justified risk taken to provoke new possibilities; a sudden regretted action after a long bout of concentrated and patient work; pushing oneself into a position of power through intense work.

saturn_taurus.name: Ostentation
saturn_taurus.image_description: Venus rides a sea-bull surrounded by cherubim and dolphins. The planet Venus rules the sign of Taurus and represents the romantic, pleasure-loving nature of the sign. Above, a rich woman drives a golden chariot drawn by white bulls.
saturn_taurus.personal: For Saturn Taureans, ambition is served by the material achievements gained through a great ability to sense the value of things and also to make them grow. There is a powerful materialistic overtone to the Saturn/Taurus persona that can show as an obsessive concern for money, selfishness and a need to show off. A fear of losing face can override all other matters, and someone with this planet/sign combination is anxious to maintain the status quo at all costs. There is also, however, a romantic, even artistic overtone to this card that usually relates to abilities with money or personal profit. The nature of Saturn in any sign is to control, and when this combines with the stubborn and fixed nature of Taurus, it hardens the somewhat easy-going, pleasure-loving qualities of the sign. Saturn Taureans have a tendency to use other people's generosity or sponsorship to further their own needs.
saturn_taurus.reading: If this card appears in a reading in response to a question concerning possessions or finance, it indicates a steady and continuous improvement with a strong application to duty and responsibilities. It is significant of the Ostentation card that although one may be doing the right thing in terms of ambition and economics, it will not usually make the questioner very popular. With regard to timing, the effects of this card are not easy to throw off, and may maintain their pressure for a long period.
saturn_taurus.events: The temptation to scheme to gain a material advantage; choosing the most impressive, status-enhancing option; a large financial commitment.

saturn_gemini.name: Concentration
saturn_gemini.image_description: A star is centered in a delicate spider's web. The web signifies patience and concentration. Above, an imp cavorts astride a pair of tightly closed lips while seven swords dance dangerously around him.
saturn_gemini.personal: People with Saturn in Gemini show a capacity for good, disciplined thinking and reasoning. With Saturn, the desire to achieve is foremost, and the Gemini talents combine to find quick and appropriate answers. The need to appear to be the right person in every ambitious situation can sometimes lead to bluff and name-dropping. Practical and systematic, Saturn/Gemini people are persistent in solving tricky problems. When it comes to looking after their own matters, clarity in contracts and agreements are of importance to Saturn Geminians, for they need to know precisely where they stand. They often have a talent for mathematics and science, and the painstaking attitude that goes with this kind of activity. Most of the information they require is geared to their career and ambition. Technical books and biographies of the famous are likely to be more important on their shelves than fiction. Negatively, people with this planet/sign combination, although basically resourceful and flexible, tend to be over-suspicious, hypercritical and twitchy.
saturn_gemini.reading: In a reading, this card suggests a situation full of distractions and unnecessary complications; only by keeping conscientiously to the essence of the matter will the questioner arrive at a successful conclusion. Because Gemini rules the Third House, the card can indicate strain in the questioner's relationship with siblings.
saturn_gemini.events: Talking one's way into an important job; using much concentrated research to achieve something, long conscientious study; ignoring someone's deliberate distractions.

saturn_cancer.name: Charity
saturn_cancer.image_description: A mother with her two children moves protectively away from a large impressive but severe building. In the sky, angels reach out in sympathy to the three figures.
saturn_cancer.personal: People with Saturn in the sign of Cancer show responsibility and self-discipline where family matters are concerned. Often this planet/sign combination indicates people whose own early environment may have been harsh or severe, and who may still have a few emotional scars. For this reason, it is more than usually important that the people this card describes improve their own family's circumstances, although real home comforts and security are likely to come later in life. There will be periods during which Saturn Cancerians feel emotionally isolated from the family, or may have to take on extra responsibility. Whatever this may be, they take family and social responsibilities seriously, valuing stability and security. Negatively, however, this can produce over-possessiveness towards material things and loved ones. Conscientious work in caring for or helping others will prove fulfilling throughout life for Saturn Cancerians. Often this planet/sign combination indicates the need for much hard work to keep up required standards of security and comfort. Nevertheless, feelings are hidden from public view to maintain dignity – Saturn/Cancer people suffer conflicting moods that manifest as difficulty in expressing feelings for fear of losing dignity.
saturn_cancer.reading: When this card is revealed in a reading, it can indicate a struggle to maintain family or home security. It may involve accepting reluctantly the material assistance of an institution.
saturn_cancer.events: Work for a charity or institution; a responsible post in which one is rewarded for good works; rewards for social work; foster parenting.

saturn_leo.name: Generosity
saturn_leo.image_description: An enthusiastic speaker addresses a large gathering, passing on the words of a great prophet of the past. The image of the prophet sits above, as an inspiration for the performance of the speaker.
saturn_leo.personal: Saturn Leos are strongly driven to use their tenacity and self-discipline in showy generosity that leads towards recognition and a better position in life. Generally their ambition, which has behind it the possibility of artistic potential, will seek some kind of showy creative outlet, and they can be successful professionally in entertainment, management, creative or educational roles. Saturn lions are best when not guarding their creative talents. People with this planet/sign combination need to gain the respect and even admiration of others, but there is a danger that this can push them into over-bearing behavior or into approval-seeking. Alternatively, they may have a tendency to be wary of expressing feelings or views until quite sure of the reception, which can lead to missed opportunities. This card indicates the possibility of a romantic involvement with someone much older or more experienced. Negatively, people with this aspect may need to deal with disappointment in creative or love matters. This is made easier when they bring themselves to reach out for help from others: in relationships, Saturn Leos have a certain reserved, suffering-in-seclusion quality that is not helpful.
saturn_leo.reading: When Saturn in Leo is drawn, the subject of the reading has much creative joy to share; if this is offered with no strings attached, the chances of a successful outcome are assured.
saturn_leo.events: An opportunity to shine, being asked to perform for a good cause; teaching creative skills to those less talented; helping with the education of children.

saturn_virgo.name: Isolation
saturn_virgo.image_description: A man comforts his friend who looks away in despair. Above is a country landscape with trees among the ruins of a monastery. The old stones crumble away and the trees thrive.
saturn_virgo.personal: Persistence and self-discipline in the Saturn/Virgo life is chiefly geared to achieving perfection at work. People with this planet/sign combination care about system and order in the workplace, and in extremes can be over-perfectionist and supercritical. Personal discipline and dependability come fairly easily to the people this card describes, but they may find themselves being a little too harsh on less-able colleagues. Work on their own which involves some kind of analytical ability could be a strength. Health and diet are important to the Saturn Virgoan – try not to be such a worrier, though! Saturn/Virgo people tend to take on heavy responsibilities in their employment or service to others, and are often found in positions in which they work alone with sole responsibility for a major project. There is probably a great deal of respect for their conscientiousness from fellow workers, but they must take care not to overload themselves, or health will suffer. Financial security comes about through the personal hard work and specialized skills of people with this aspect. Negatively, devotion to perfection and accuracy in all matters can lead to a gloomy, austere, depressed outlook that engenders unpopularity and isolation from more relaxed and less worried company.
saturn_virgo.reading: When this card appears, it always indicates an immediate need to let up on oneself – to take a break from the pressure of work matters that are of one's own making.
saturn_virgo.events: Quality-checking a project; reorganizing to increase efficiency; working for long periods alone; setting standards for oneself that are too high.

saturn_libra.name: Devotion
saturn_libra.image_description: A dove sits in a tree and will not leave its partner lying on the ground motionless. Above an orb representing night and day, Sun and Moon floats in a starry sky.
saturn_libra.personal: Social responsibility and work for the community are indicated when Saturn occupies the sign of Libra. A strong sense of justice in relationships can give people with this planet/sign combination outstanding abilities in areas of arbitration or legal matters. They have the potential for gaining great respect from others, but risk the danger that their desire to see both sides of a question can lead to dithering indecision. The devotion of Saturn Librans to a relationship or partnership is long, enduring and unstinting. However, the eternal Libran difficulty in coming down firmly on one side or another in decisive situations can weaken the best of partnerships. This aside, Saturn Librans have great potential for success in organizing and group endeavors. This placing of Saturn indicates a marriage late in life, or a life partnership with a serious, older, career-oriented person, possibly even someone quite famous in their career. Positively, this can be a stable, enduring relationship. In any partnership, Saturn Librans are prepared to work hard, maintaining their share of responsibility. Legal arrangements may prove to become important in partnerships.
saturn_libra.reading: In a reading, this card indicates the danger that the questioner may, in a desire to please all, promise more than he or she can possibly achieve. This results in a hopeless situation of attempting to meet obligations that cannot be successfully completed.
saturn_libra.events: Taking part in a legal case; drawing up an agreement of importance; a relationship with a great age difference, a long-lasting marriage.

saturn_scorpio.name: Inheritance
saturn_scorpio.image_description: In the distance, among craggy hills behind a lively town, is a huge castle, representing the past, tradition and inheritance. Above, a classic maze has a unicorn at the center – a powerful and fierce beast that can only be tamed by a virgin.
saturn_scorpio.personal: For Saturn Scorpios, finances and shared property are areas of life requiring self-discipline and responsibility. Somewhat perfectionist in their work, and able to take this to extremes, the people this card describes can earn the reputation among workmates and colleagues of being hard taskmasters. Those with this planet/sign combination can exert enormous and persistent energy in order to achieve aims, and accept a great deal of personal hardship in the process. Because of this ability, they find it difficult to realize when they have taken on too much – to the detriment of their health. So, with this card especially, this sign placing indicates that Saturn Scorpios would be better advised, where possible, to avoid personal legal matters, such as litigation. They may, however, find themselves quite happily looking after other people's financial or legal problems, and in this role – providing they are sure to keep everything above board – the Saturn/Scorpio personality can be quite successful.
saturn_scorpio.reading: Because of Scorpio's rulership of the Eighth House, there is promise of an inheritance of some kind whenever this card is drawn in a reading. Negatively, the Inheritance card can indicate the capability of the questioner to harbor deep, brooding resentment when he or she feels some injustice has been perpetrated.
saturn_scorpio.events: Managing an inheritance; dealing with other people's property, selling on behalf of another person, an executor of a will; situations involving long and patient work.

saturn_sagittarius.name: Fulfillment
saturn_sagittarius.image_description: A merchant sits on a chest at the quayside, awaiting the arrival of a sailing ship from abroad. In the foreground is a large sack of money. Above is an ancient talisman to bring good fortune in any lottery.
saturn_sagittarius.personal: For Sagittarians, the areas of life in which Saturnian discipline and responsibility find most fulfillment is the quest for knowledge and truth. People with this combination are intellectually proud and have a strong desire to be accepted as an authority in a specialized field. Philosophy and religion are of great importance to Saturn Sagittarians, and they speak out for and stick conscientiously to their own moral code. The planet Saturn gives the ambition of Sagittarius a solid sense of achievement, and injects reality into the Archer's natural optimism. The negative side of people with this planet/sign combination can be a self-righteous attitude that attempts to impose its philosophy and ethics on others. This can defeat the Sagittarian's strong need for personal reputation. There can be bluntness in the Saturn/Sagittarian manner, which although prompted by honesty, may have little concern for other people's feelings. However, hypocrisy is not something Saturn Sagittarians are comfortable with, and they may prefer to settle for the wrath of the offended. Long-distance travel, particularly for business on any of the above activities, can be successful and quite lucrative for Saturn Sagittarians. Likewise, dealings with foreign people or companies.
saturn_sagittarius.reading: Usually when this card turns up in a reading, it indicates a successful culmination to an ambition or business venture. This usually has something to do with a contact in a foreign country.
saturn_sagittarius.events: An important business trip abroad, an international conference, acquiring a reputation abroad; the effects of a major faux pas.

saturn_capricorn.name: Riches
saturn_capricorn.image_description: Below stands the winged figure of Fortuna, carrying the symbols of her riches: health, wealth and the arts. Beside her is the pentacle, representing man and the five senses. Above is the great seal of the fruits of the earth.
saturn_capricorn.personal: Saturn is in its happiest position in the sign of Capricorn, and people with this placing feel a great need to make their mark on life. For that reason, they direct extreme self-discipline and tenacity towards personal achievement. They have more patience than most people, and this is just as well, as by far their greatest successes occur as they get older. Saturn/Capricorn people are good organizers and take their responsibilities seriously. They can accept other people's authority, knowing that this is just a step on the path to becoming an authority themselves. It is always advisable for Saturn Capricornians to beware of going over the top and forgetting their sense of fun. They may need to heed the old saying about all work and no play. Life begins at forty for people with Saturn in Capricorn, and most people with this aspect grow easier and more relaxed as they prosper and flourish with each progressive success. The negative of all this is not nice and, in extreme cases, the Saturn Capricornian becomes the power-hungry miser, treading on other people's backs to get to the top. If excessive value is put on financial gain, one runs the risk of losing all sense of reality, putting every effort into making more and more money and refusing to spend on anything.
saturn_capricorn.reading: When the Riches card appears in a reading, it usually points towards the successful conclusion of a financial arrangement or deal.
saturn_capricorn.events: The stock market; dealings with government organizations, involvement in politics; receiving an honor of some kind.

saturn_aquarius.name: Eccentricity
saturn_aquarius.image_description: In the foreground is a strange creature – half-woman, half-fish – an ancient image of the mermaid. She holds a plant that grows both ways from her hand, apparently rootless. Behind is a peaceful walled town and in the sky a flying fish soars.
saturn_aquarius.personal: Saturn Aquarians expand their lives through the disciplined and patient application of their inventive minds to any area that is of interest. They are attracted to new ways of thinking or unusual approaches to traditional systems. Whatever they do in this area they approach in the same broad-minded, scientific way, as if doing research. Because of this non-conformist attitude, Saturn Aquarians can be labeled as eccentric or oddball, although generally they are level-headed and a fund of good advice for colleagues and friends. There is a danger, however, that the Saturn/Aquarian detached view of life can develop into coldness and emotional insensitivity where personal relationships are concerned. People with this planet/sign combination may feel that their career can be strongly influenced by knowing important and powerful people. There is also a danger that this could become the sole reason for some friendships, earning them a reputation as a social-climber. Positively, this can be an aspect of loyalty and long-term associations in which friends help friends. Certainly, many of the relationships of the Saturn Aquarian will be with much older and more experienced people.
saturn_aquarius.reading: When this card is selected in a reading, it can indicate that the questioner is either currently going against expected behavior, or would change their fortunes by doing so. Now is the time to forget what others will think.
saturn_aquarius.events: Work with technology such as computers; revolutionary or unusual group activities; a powerful or influential friend; a radical decision.

saturn_pisces.name: Loss
saturn_pisces.image_description: Below, a raven pecks at the last scrap of flesh from a bony skull – Saturn is traditionally the planet that can signify loss. Above is a grand house and grounds. Couples stroll in a carefree manner in the evening light.
saturn_pisces.personal: Much of the Saturn Piscean potential for self-discipline and responsibility is invested in helping other people with problems. The sensitivity of people with this planet/sign combination to others' needs can make it difficult for them not to become involved in helping people in some way. If this manifests in a professional job, then all well and good, but the demands will be great. Saturn Pisceans have a strong insight into the motivations of those around them, but should be careful that they don't lose their own identity when faced with other people's demands. Excessive imagination and sympathy can create problems that don't really exist, as other people's sadness, sorrows and losses become their own. Often, Saturn Pisceans feel the desire or need to work in seclusion, or retreat from the world in some way. It may be that they will be attracted to the study of the deeper processes in the unconscious mind, and in such interests as psychology. But watch that an excessive tendency to compulsive inward-looking does not become over-obsessional. Saturn Pisceans are better looking outward (towards others) than looking within.
saturn_pisces.reading: When this card is chosen in a reading, it indicates a loss of some kind, but it may be worth thinking about what is really concerned here. Could it be that the enquirer is really worrying about someone else's loss, not their own?
saturn_pisces.events: A feeling of loss; situations involving hospitals or health clinics; work in the field of complementary therapies, counseling others; developing interests in the occult.

horary.title: The Horary

horary.revealLine: Turn upwards only the cards covering the house positions that relate to the question.
